terms.quick_def: For subscription businesses, the predictable yearly revenue you'd get if everyone kept paying their current plan. The number SaaS investors care about most.
terms.why_it_matters: OpenAI's $25B annualized revenue (Sacra) and MSFT's $37B AI run-rate are the disclosed ARR-class numbers anchoring the AI-revenue-disclosure-rewrite thesis.

quick_def_locales.en: For subscription businesses, the predictable yearly revenue you'd get if everyone kept paying their current plan. The number SaaS investors care about most.
quick_def_locales.ja: サブスク事業で、現状の契約者全員が同じプランを払い続けた場合に得られる、予測可能な年間売上。SaaS 投資家が最も重視する数字。
quick_def_locales.es: Para negocios de suscripción, los ingresos anuales predecibles que tendrías si todos siguieran pagando su plan actual. El número que más importa a los inversores SaaS.
quick_def_locales.fil: Para sa subscription businesses, ang predictable yearly revenue kung lahat ay magpapatuloy sa current plan nila. Ang numerong pinakaiintindihan ng SaaS investors.

why.en: OpenAI's $25B annualized revenue (Sacra) and MSFT's $37B AI run-rate are the disclosed ARR-class numbers anchoring the AI-revenue-disclosure-rewrite thesis.
why.ja: OpenAI の年率 250 億ドル売上 (Sacra) と MSFT の AI ラン・レート 370 億ドルが、開示済みの ARR 級数値で、AI 売上開示書き換えテーゼの基準点。
why.es: Los $25B anualizados de ingresos de OpenAI (Sacra) y los $37B de run-rate de IA de MSFT son las cifras tipo ARR divulgadas que anclan la tesis de la reescritura de la divulgación de ingresos de IA.
why.fil: Ang $25B annualized revenue ng OpenAI (Sacra) at $37B AI run-rate ng MSFT ang disclosed ARR-class numbers na nag-aanchor sa AI-revenue-disclosure-rewrite thesis.

terms.quick_def: A list of all the tricks attackers actually use, organized like a recipe book. Defenders compare their detections against it.
terms.why_it_matters: Standard vocabulary for talking about attacker behavior. Without it, every security vendor invents their own taxonomy.

quick_def_locales.en: A list of all the tricks attackers actually use, organized like a recipe book. Defenders compare their detections against it.
quick_def_locales.ja: 攻撃者が実際に使う手口の一覧をレシピ帳のように整理したもの。守る側は自分の検知をこれに照らしてチェックする。
quick_def_locales.es: Una lista de todos los trucos que los atacantes usan en realidad, organizada como un recetario. Los defensores comparan sus detecciones con ella.
quick_def_locales.fil: Listahan ng lahat ng tricks na talagang ginagamit ng mga attacker, nakaayos parang recipe book. Iko-compare ng mga defender ang detections nila dito.

why.en: Standard vocabulary for talking about attacker behavior. Without it, every security vendor invents their own taxonomy.
why.ja: 攻撃者の挙動を語るときの共通語彙。これが無いと、各セキュリティベンダーが独自の分類を作って噛み合わない。
why.es: Vocabulario estándar para hablar del comportamiento de los atacantes. Sin él, cada proveedor de seguridad inventa su propia taxonomía.
why.fil: Standard na bokabularyo para pag-usapan ang attacker behavior. Kung wala ito, magkakanya-kaniyang taxonomy ang bawat security vendor.

terms.quick_def: AWS Bedrock's hosted runtime for agents — managed harness, sandbox, identity, and observability. Amazon's answer to Microsoft's Foundry Agent Framework.
terms.why_it_matters: AgentCore + Foundry + Vertex AI Agent Builder is the three-cloud agent-runtime substrate. Where the agent-control-plane thesis becomes infra you can buy.

quick_def_locales.en: AWS Bedrock's hosted runtime for agents — managed harness, sandbox, identity, and observability. Amazon's answer to Microsoft's Foundry Agent Framework.
quick_def_locales.ja: AWS Bedrock 上のエージェント専用ホストランタイム — マネージドハーネス、サンドボックス、アイデンティティ、可観測性を提供。Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework に対する Amazon の回答。
quick_def_locales.es: El runtime alojado para agentes de AWS Bedrock — harness gestionado, sandbox, identidad y observabilidad. Respuesta de Amazon al Foundry Agent Framework de Microsoft.
quick_def_locales.fil: Hosted runtime para sa agents ng AWS Bedrock — managed harness, sandbox, identity, at observability. Sagot ng Amazon sa Foundry Agent Framework ng Microsoft.

why.en: AgentCore + Foundry + Vertex AI Agent Builder is the three-cloud agent-runtime substrate. Where the agent-control-plane thesis becomes infra you can buy.
why.ja: AgentCore + Foundry + Vertex AI Agent Builder の三クラウドが、エージェント・ランタイムの基盤を構成する。エージェント制御プレーンテーゼが「買えるインフラ」になる場所。
why.es: AgentCore + Foundry + Vertex AI Agent Builder es el sustrato de runtime de agentes en tres nubes. Donde la tesis del plano de control de agentes se convierte en infra que puedes comprar.
why.fil: Ang AgentCore + Foundry + Vertex AI Agent Builder ang three-cloud agent-runtime substrate. Dito nagiging infra na pwedeng bilhin ang agent-control-plane thesis.

terms.quick_def: The CISA directive that turns the KEV catalog into a hard rule for US federal agencies: if a CVE lands on KEV, you have a fixed number of days to patch it. The teeth behind KEV.
terms.why_it_matters: BOD-22-01 is what turns 'high CVSS' into 'enterprise calendar event' — federal patch deadlines on KEV-listed bugs are the operative escalation that ties enterprise patching schedules to a public catalog.

quick_def_locales.en: The CISA directive that turns the KEV catalog into a hard rule for US federal agencies: if a CVE lands on KEV, you have a fixed number of days to patch it. The teeth behind KEV.
quick_def_locales.ja: KEV カタログを米連邦機関にとっての強制ルールに変える CISA 指令 — KEV 入りした CVE は決められた日数以内に修正必須。KEV の歯。
quick_def_locales.es: La directiva de CISA que convierte el catálogo KEV en una regla firme para las agencias federales de EE. UU.: si un CVE entra en KEV, hay un número fijo de días para parchearlo. Los dientes detrás de KEV.
quick_def_locales.fil: Direktiba ng CISA na ginagawang mahigpit na panuntunan ang KEV catalog para sa US federal agencies: pagkasok ng CVE sa KEV, may takdang araw para mai-patch. Ang ngipin ng KEV.

why.en: BOD-22-01 is what turns 'high CVSS' into 'enterprise calendar event' — federal patch deadlines on KEV-listed bugs are the operative escalation that ties enterprise patching schedules to a public catalog.
why.ja: BOD-22-01 こそが「高い CVSS」を「企業カレンダーの予定」に変える機構 — KEV 掲載バグへの連邦パッチ期限が、企業のパッチスケジュールを公開カタログに紐付ける運用上のエスカレーション。
why.es: BOD-22-01 es lo que convierte 'CVSS alto' en 'evento del calendario empresarial' — los plazos federales de parche para bugs en KEV son la escalada operativa que ata los calendarios empresariales de parcheo a un catálogo público.
why.fil: Ang BOD-22-01 ang nagpapatuloy sa 'mataas na CVSS' patungo sa 'enterprise calendar event' — ang federal patch deadlines para sa KEV-listed bugs ang operative escalation na nag-uugnay sa enterprise patching schedules sa isang public catalog.

terms.quick_def: AWS's marketplace for hosted AI models — you call OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, etc. through one Amazon API instead of each vendor's. The 'every model on every cloud' surface.
terms.why_it_matters: Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry is the multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization substrate. As frontier labs ship models across all three clouds, model-portability shifts from a buyer-side promise to an operational substrate.

quick_def_locales.en: AWS's marketplace for hosted AI models — you call OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, etc. through one Amazon API instead of each vendor's. The 'every model on every cloud' surface.
quick_def_locales.ja: AWS のホスト AI モデルマーケット。OpenAI、Anthropic、Meta などを Amazon の単一 API 経由で呼べる。「すべてのモデルがすべてのクラウドに」を体現する場。
quick_def_locales.es: Mercado de AWS para modelos de IA alojados — llamas a OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, etc. a través de una sola API de Amazon en lugar de la de cada proveedor. La superficie de 'cada modelo en cada nube'.
quick_def_locales.fil: Marketplace ng AWS para sa hosted AI models — tumatawag ka sa OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, atbp. via isang Amazon API kaysa sa bawat vendor. Ang surface ng 'every model on every cloud'.

why.en: Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry is the multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization substrate. As frontier labs ship models across all three clouds, model-portability shifts from a buyer-side promise to an operational substrate.
why.ja: Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry がマルチクラウド・フロンティアモデル SLA 標準化の基盤。フロンティアラボが三クラウド全てにモデルを展開する流れは、モデル移植性をバイヤー側への約束から運用基盤に変えていく。
why.es: Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry es el sustrato de estandarización de SLA para modelos frontera multinube. A medida que los frontier labs publican sus modelos en las tres nubes, la portabilidad de modelos pasa de promesa al comprador a sustrato operativo.
why.fil: Ang Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry ang substrate ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization. Habang nag-de-deploy ang frontier labs ng kanilang models sa tatlong clouds, lumilipat ang model-portability mula buyer-side promise patungo sa operational substrate.

terms.quick_def: The US federal agency that runs national cybersecurity defense — issues KEV catalog, BOD-22-01 deadlines, and coordinates incident response across critical infrastructure.
terms.why_it_matters: CISA's KEV adds + AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog hypothesis is the regulatory pivot of the AI-Infra-CVE-class thesis. Federal patch deadlines turn CVE scores into enterprise calendar events.

quick_def_locales.en: The US federal agency that runs national cybersecurity defense — issues KEV catalog, BOD-22-01 deadlines, and coordinates incident response across critical infrastructure.
quick_def_locales.ja: 米連邦のサイバーセキュリティ防衛を担う機関 — KEV カタログ発行、BOD-22-01 期限の運用、重要インフラのインシデント対応調整を行う。
quick_def_locales.es: La agencia federal de EE. UU. que dirige la defensa nacional de ciberseguridad — emite el catálogo KEV, los plazos de la BOD-22-01 y coordina la respuesta a incidentes en infraestructuras críticas.
quick_def_locales.fil: US federal agency na nangangasiwa ng national cybersecurity defense — naglalabas ng KEV catalog, BOD-22-01 deadlines, at nag-coordinate ng incident response sa critical infrastructure.

why.en: CISA's KEV adds + AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog hypothesis is the regulatory pivot of the AI-Infra-CVE-class thesis. Federal patch deadlines turn CVE scores into enterprise calendar events.
why.ja: CISA の KEV 追加と「AI インフラ KEV サブカタログ」仮説は AI インフラ CVE クラステーゼの規制軸。連邦のパッチ期限が CVE スコアを企業カレンダーの予定に変える。
why.es: Las altas en KEV de CISA + la hipótesis del subcatálogo KEV de AI-Infra son el pivote regulatorio de la tesis de la clase CVE de AI-Infra. Los plazos federales de parcheo convierten las puntuaciones CVE en eventos del calendario empresarial.
why.fil: Ang KEV adds ng CISA + AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog hypothesis ang regulatory pivot ng AI-Infra-CVE-class thesis. Pinapatutuyo ng federal patch deadlines ang CVE scores bilang enterprise calendar events.

terms.quick_def: An industry group setting rules for how AI agents are kept safe — like a homeowners' association for AI security.
terms.why_it_matters: If CSAI's rules become a CNA-issued standard, agentic AI risk becomes a compliance category, not just a research topic.

quick_def_locales.en: An industry group setting rules for how AI agents are kept safe — like a homeowners' association for AI security.
quick_def_locales.ja: AI エージェントの安全運用ルールを決める業界団体。AI セキュリティの「町内会」のようなもの。
quick_def_locales.es: Un grupo de la industria que establece las reglas para mantener seguros a los agentes de IA — como una asociación de vecinos para la seguridad de IA.
quick_def_locales.fil: Industriya group na nagtatakda ng mga panuntunan para safe ang AI agents — parang homeowners' association para sa AI security.

why.en: If CSAI's rules become a CNA-issued standard, agentic AI risk becomes a compliance category, not just a research topic.
why.ja: CSAI のルールが CNA 発行の標準になれば、エージェント AI のリスクは研究テーマからコンプライアンス要件に変わる。
why.es: Si las reglas de CSAI se convierten en un estándar emitido por una CNA, el riesgo de los agentes de IA pasa de tema de investigación a categoría de cumplimiento.
why.fil: Kapag naging CNA-issued standard ang mga rules ng CSAI, magiging compliance category na (hindi lang research topic) ang agentic AI risk.

terms.quick_def: A unique ID for every known software bug that can be exploited. Lets the world refer to the same problem unambiguously.
terms.why_it_matters: If a bug has no CVE, it's invisible to enterprise patch programs and compliance checks.

quick_def_locales.en: A unique ID for every known software bug that can be exploited. Lets the world refer to the same problem unambiguously.
quick_def_locales.ja: 悪用可能な既知のソフトウェアバグ 1 つ 1 つに付く一意の ID。世界中で同じ問題を曖昧さなく指し示せる。
quick_def_locales.es: Un ID único para cada bug de software conocido que puede ser explotado. Permite que el mundo se refiera al mismo problema sin ambigüedad.
quick_def_locales.fil: Natatanging ID para sa bawat kilalang software bug na pwedeng i-exploit. Para ma-refer ng mundo ang parehong problema nang walang ambiguity.

why.en: If a bug has no CVE, it's invisible to enterprise patch programs and compliance checks.
why.ja: CVE が無いバグは企業のパッチ管理プログラムやコンプラチェックから見えなくなる。
why.es: Si un bug no tiene CVE, es invisible para los programas de parches empresariales y los controles de cumplimiento.
why.fil: Kung walang CVE ang bug, hindi ito nakikita ng enterprise patch programs at compliance checks.

terms.quick_def: A 0-10 score for how bad a software bug is. 9-10 means drop everything and patch.
terms.why_it_matters: Drives the cutoff for what enterprises must patch within how many days. Score >= 8.0 is the spotlight zone.

quick_def_locales.en: A 0-10 score for how bad a software bug is. 9-10 means drop everything and patch.
quick_def_locales.ja: ソフトウェアバグの危険度を 0-10 で表すスコア。9-10 なら全部止めてパッチ。
quick_def_locales.es: Una puntuación de 0 a 10 sobre la gravedad de un bug de software. 9-10 significa dejarlo todo y parchear.
quick_def_locales.fil: Score na 0-10 kung gaano kasama ang software bug. Ang 9-10 ay senyas na 'drop everything at i-patch agad'.

why.en: Drives the cutoff for what enterprises must patch within how many days. Score >= 8.0 is the spotlight zone.
why.ja: 企業が「何日以内に何をパッチするか」の境界線を決める基準。スコア 8.0 以上は要対応。
why.es: Define el corte de qué deben parchear las empresas y en cuántos días. Una puntuación >= 8.0 es la zona de atención inmediata.
why.fil: Itinatakda nito ang cutoff kung ano ang dapat i-patch ng enterprises sa loob ng ilang araw. Score >= 8.0 ang spotlight zone.

terms.quick_def: The US military's procurement and operations command — runs the world's largest classified-network IT estate. AI-procurement decisions ripple from DoD outward to allied governments.
terms.why_it_matters: DoD classified-network procurement decisions are operative procurement precedents for how presidential-administration policy and frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons posture intersect with federal acquisition.

quick_def_locales.en: The US military's procurement and operations command — runs the world's largest classified-network IT estate. AI-procurement decisions ripple from DoD outward to allied governments.
quick_def_locales.ja: 米軍の調達・運用司令部 — 世界最大の機密ネットワーク IT 環境を運営する。AI 調達の決定は DoD から同盟国政府へ波及する。
quick_def_locales.es: El mando de adquisiciones y operaciones del ejército estadounidense — opera el mayor patrimonio TI de redes clasificadas del mundo. Las decisiones de adquisición de IA se propagan desde el DoD hacia los gobiernos aliados.
quick_def_locales.fil: Procurement at operations command ng US military — pinapatakbo ang pinakamalaking classified-network IT estate sa mundo. Mula sa DoD lumalaganap ang AI-procurement decisions papuntang allied governments.

why.en: DoD classified-network procurement decisions are operative procurement precedents for how presidential-administration policy and frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons posture intersect with federal acquisition.
why.ja: 国防総省の機密ネットワーク調達決定は、大統領府の政策とフロンティア AI ラボの自律兵器姿勢が連邦調達と交差する仕組みを示す運用上の調達前例。
why.es: Las decisiones de adquisición de redes clasificadas del DoD son precedentes operativos de cómo la política de la administración presidencial y la postura sobre armas autónomas de los laboratorios de IA frontera se cruzan con la adquisición federal.
why.fil: Ang DoD classified-network procurement decisions ang operative procurement precedents kung paano nag-iintersect ang presidential-administration policy at frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons posture sa federal acquisition.

terms.quick_def: How much profit a company made per share of stock. Quarterly earnings reports lead with this number; 'beating EPS' is the headline win.
terms.why_it_matters: Mag 7 EPS prints anchor the AI-capex ROI debate. Estimate-vs-actual gap is the buy-side's cleanest signal of whether AI spend is paying off.

quick_def_locales.en: How much profit a company made per share of stock. Quarterly earnings reports lead with this number; 'beating EPS' is the headline win.
quick_def_locales.ja: 1 株あたりの利益。四半期決算はまずこの数字から始まり、「EPS をビートした」が見出しになる。
quick_def_locales.es: Cuánto beneficio generó una empresa por cada acción. Los informes trimestrales abren con esta cifra; 'batir el EPS' es el titular ganador.
quick_def_locales.fil: Kita ng kompanya bawat share ng stock. Tinatanghal ng quarterly earnings reports ang numerong ito; 'beating EPS' ang headline win.

why.en: Mag 7 EPS prints anchor the AI-capex ROI debate. Estimate-vs-actual gap is the buy-side's cleanest signal of whether AI spend is paying off.
why.ja: Mag 7 の EPS 結果が AI capex の ROI 議論の起点。予想と実績の差が、AI 投資が回収できているかを示すバイサイド最大の合図。
why.es: Las cifras de EPS de los Mag 7 anclan el debate sobre el ROI del capex de IA. La brecha entre estimación y realidad es la señal más clara del buy-side sobre si el gasto en IA está rindiendo.
why.fil: Ang Mag 7 EPS prints ang nag-aanchor sa AI-capex ROI debate. Ang gap sa pagitan ng estimate at actual ang pinakamalinaw na signal ng buy-side kung kumikita na ang AI spend.

terms.quick_def: The European Union's AI law — categorizes AI systems by risk level and sets rules for each category, with the heaviest rules on biometric ID, education, hiring, and law enforcement.
terms.why_it_matters: EU AI Act compliance phases are the operative deadline structure non-EU AI vendors trade against. CSAI / NIST / EU triangulation defines what 'compliant' means in cross-border procurement.

quick_def_locales.en: The European Union's AI law — categorizes AI systems by risk level and sets rules for each category, with the heaviest rules on biometric ID, education, hiring, and law enforcement.
quick_def_locales.ja: 欧州連合の AI 法 — AI システムをリスクレベルで分類し、カテゴリごとにルールを定める。最も重い規制は生体認証 ID、教育、採用、法執行に課される。
quick_def_locales.es: La ley de IA de la Unión Europea — clasifica los sistemas de IA por nivel de riesgo y fija reglas para cada categoría, con las normas más estrictas en identificación biométrica, educación, contratación y aplicación de la ley.
quick_def_locales.fil: Batas ng European Union sa AI — kine-classify ang AI systems ayon sa risk level at nagtatakda ng rules per category, pinakamabigat sa biometric ID, education, hiring, at law enforcement.

why.en: EU AI Act compliance phases are the operative deadline structure non-EU AI vendors trade against. CSAI / NIST / EU triangulation defines what 'compliant' means in cross-border procurement.
why.ja: EU AI Act の段階的なコンプライアンス適用が、EU 域外 AI ベンダーにとっての運用上の期限構造。CSAI / NIST / EU の三角測量が国境横断調達における「適合」の定義を決める。
why.es: Las fases de cumplimiento de la EU AI Act son la estructura de plazos operativa contra la que los proveedores de IA no UE negocian. La triangulación CSAI / NIST / UE define qué significa 'cumplir' en compras transfronterizas.
why.fil: Ang compliance phases ng EU AI Act ang operative deadline structure na pinagba-base ng non-EU AI vendors. Ang CSAI / NIST / EU triangulation ang nagde-define kung ano ang 'compliant' sa cross-border procurement.

terms.quick_def: The committee inside the US Federal Reserve that decides interest rates. When they raise rates, borrowing gets more expensive everywhere.
terms.why_it_matters: FOMC posture sets the discount rate every AI-capex story is priced against. Fed leadership and rate-trajectory shifts reshape the monetary-policy market psychology that AI-capex valuations depend on.

quick_def_locales.en: The committee inside the US Federal Reserve that decides interest rates. When they raise rates, borrowing gets more expensive everywhere.
quick_def_locales.ja: 米連邦準備制度の委員会で、政策金利を決める。金利を上げれば、世界中で借入コストが上昇する。
quick_def_locales.es: El comité dentro de la Reserva Federal de EE. UU. que decide los tipos de interés. Cuando suben los tipos, los préstamos se encarecen en todas partes.
quick_def_locales.fil: Komiteng nasa loob ng US Federal Reserve na nagdedesisyon sa interest rates. Pag itinaas nila ang rates, mas mahal ang paghiram saan man.

why.en: FOMC posture sets the discount rate every AI-capex story is priced against. Fed leadership and rate-trajectory shifts reshape the monetary-policy market psychology that AI-capex valuations depend on.
why.ja: FOMC の姿勢が、すべての AI capex ストーリーの割引率の前提になる。連邦準備理事会の指導体制と金利方向性の変化が、AI capex 評価が依存する金融政策市場心理を作り直す。
why.es: La postura del FOMC fija el tipo de descuento contra el que se valoran todas las historias de capex de IA. El liderazgo de la Fed y los giros en la trayectoria de tasas reconfiguran la psicología de mercado de política monetaria de la que dependen las valoraciones de capex de IA.
why.fil: Ang posture ng FOMC ang nagse-set sa discount rate na pinagba-base sa AI-capex stories. Ang Fed leadership at mga shift sa rate trajectory ang humuhubog sa monetary-policy market psychology na pinagba-base ng AI-capex valuations.

terms.quick_def: Microsoft's umbrella for AI-app building blocks — model serving, agent runtime, observability. Foundry Local is the on-device variant that ships with Windows.
terms.why_it_matters: Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Foundry Local form the Microsoft side of the agent-control-plane thesis. Counterpart to AWS Bedrock AgentCore on the cloud side.

quick_def_locales.en: Microsoft's umbrella for AI-app building blocks — model serving, agent runtime, observability. Foundry Local is the on-device variant that ships with Windows.
quick_def_locales.ja: AI アプリ構築のための Microsoft の総合ブランド — モデル配信、エージェントランタイム、可観測性を束ねる。Foundry Local は Windows 同梱のオンデバイス版。
quick_def_locales.es: Paraguas de Microsoft para los bloques de construcción de aplicaciones de IA — serving de modelos, runtime de agentes, observabilidad. Foundry Local es la variante on-device que viene con Windows.
quick_def_locales.fil: Umbrella ng Microsoft para sa AI-app building blocks — model serving, agent runtime, observability. Ang Foundry Local ang on-device variant na kasama sa Windows.

why.en: Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Foundry Local form the Microsoft side of the agent-control-plane thesis. Counterpart to AWS Bedrock AgentCore on the cloud side.
why.ja: Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA と Foundry Local は、エージェント制御プレーンテーゼの Microsoft 側を構成する。クラウド側の AWS Bedrock AgentCore に対応する位置づけ。
why.es: Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Foundry Local conforman el lado Microsoft de la tesis del plano de control de agentes. Contrapartida del AWS Bedrock AgentCore en el lado cloud.
why.fil: Ang Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Foundry Local ang Microsoft side ng agent-control-plane thesis. Counterpart ng AWS Bedrock AgentCore sa cloud side.

terms.quick_def: A chip originally built for video graphics that turned out to be perfect for the math behind AI — thousands of small calculations in parallel. Currently the bottleneck for training and inference.
terms.why_it_matters: GPU supply (especially NVIDIA H/B-series and AMD MI series) gates the entire AI-capex story. Hyperscaler-scale GPU deployment commitments are the sharpest single reads on chip-availability timing.

quick_def_locales.en: A chip originally built for video graphics that turned out to be perfect for the math behind AI — thousands of small calculations in parallel. Currently the bottleneck for training and inference.
quick_def_locales.ja: もともと映像描画用に作られたチップで、AI の数学処理 (大量の小計算を並列実行) に最適だと判明したもの。現状、訓練と推論のボトルネック。
quick_def_locales.es: Un chip originalmente creado para gráficos de vídeo que resultó perfecto para la matemática detrás de la IA — miles de pequeños cálculos en paralelo. Actualmente el cuello de botella para entrenamiento e inferencia.
quick_def_locales.fil: Chip na orihinal na ginawa para sa video graphics na napag-alamang perfect para sa math sa likod ng AI — libu-libong maliliit na calculation parallel. Sa ngayon, ito ang bottleneck para sa training at inference.

why.en: GPU supply (especially NVIDIA H/B-series and AMD MI series) gates the entire AI-capex story. Hyperscaler-scale GPU deployment commitments are the sharpest single reads on chip-availability timing.
why.ja: GPU 供給 (特に NVIDIA H/B シリーズと AMD MI シリーズ) が AI capex ストーリー全体の門番。ハイパースケーラ規模の GPU 配備コミットメントが、チップ供給タイミングを最も鋭く読める指標。
why.es: El suministro de GPUs (especialmente NVIDIA H/B-series y AMD MI series) limita toda la historia de capex de IA. Los compromisos de despliegue de GPUs a escala hyperscaler son las lecturas más nítidas del timing de disponibilidad de chips.
why.fil: Ang GPU supply (lalo na ang NVIDIA H/B-series at AMD MI series) ang gate ng buong AI-capex story. Ang hyperscaler-scale GPU deployment commitments ang pinaka-malinaw na single reads sa chip-availability timing.

terms.quick_def: An agent harness with a self-learned skills layer at its core — emphasizes 'depth of learning' over OpenClaw's 'breadth of integration.' Skills accumulate across runs instead of starting from scratch.
terms.why_it_matters: Hermes operationalizes the User Prediction 3 thesis (RL-trained agents that improve via feedback). The 'breadth vs depth' axis — OpenClaw vs Hermes — is the operative design choice for agent procurement.

quick_def_locales.en: An agent harness with a self-learned skills layer at its core — emphasizes 'depth of learning' over OpenClaw's 'breadth of integration.' Skills accumulate across runs instead of starting from scratch.
quick_def_locales.ja: 中核に自己学習スキル層を持つエージェントハーネス — OpenClaw の「統合幅」に対し「学習深度」を重視する設計。スキルは毎回ゼロから始めるのではなく、実行を跨いで蓄積される。
quick_def_locales.es: Un harness de agente con una capa de skills aprendidas por sí mismas en su núcleo — enfatiza 'profundidad de aprendizaje' frente a la 'amplitud de integración' de OpenClaw. Las skills se acumulan a través de ejecuciones en vez de empezar desde cero.
quick_def_locales.fil: Agent harness na may self-learned skills layer sa core — binibigyang-diin ang 'depth of learning' sa halip na 'breadth of integration' ng OpenClaw. Naka-aaccumulate ang skills sa kabuuan ng runs, hindi nagsisimulang muli sa simula.

why.en: Hermes operationalizes the User Prediction 3 thesis (RL-trained agents that improve via feedback). The 'breadth vs depth' axis — OpenClaw vs Hermes — is the operative design choice for agent procurement.
why.ja: Hermes は User Prediction 3 (フィードバックで成長する RL 訓練エージェント) を運用形に落とす存在。「統合幅 vs 学習深度」軸 — OpenClaw vs Hermes — はエージェント調達における運用上の設計選択。
why.es: Hermes operativiza la tesis de la User Prediction 3 (agentes entrenados por RL que mejoran vía feedback). El eje 'amplitud vs profundidad' — OpenClaw vs Hermes — es la elección de diseño operativa para la adquisición de agentes.
why.fil: Ino-operationalize ng Hermes ang thesis ng User Prediction 3 (RL-trained agents na umuunlad sa feedback). Ang 'breadth vs depth' axis — OpenClaw vs Hermes — ang operative design choice para sa agent procurement.

terms.quick_def: When a private company sells shares to the public for the first time and starts trading on a stock exchange. The big-bang fundraising event.
terms.why_it_matters: AI-infrastructure IPOs are the marker for capital-markets validation of the AI-capex thesis. Pricing tells you whether the buy-side believes the capex tape that hyperscalers are putting forward.

quick_def_locales.en: When a private company sells shares to the public for the first time and starts trading on a stock exchange. The big-bang fundraising event.
quick_def_locales.ja: 未上場企業が初めて公衆に株式を売り出し、証券取引所で取引が始まる瞬間。大型資金調達のビッグバン。
quick_def_locales.es: Cuando una empresa privada vende acciones al público por primera vez y empieza a cotizar en una bolsa. El evento de captación de capital tipo big bang.
quick_def_locales.fil: Kapag ipinagbibili ng pribadong kompanya ang shares sa publiko sa unang pagkakataon at nag-uumpisang mag-trade sa stock exchange. Ang big-bang fundraising event.

why.en: AI-infrastructure IPOs are the marker for capital-markets validation of the AI-capex thesis. Pricing tells you whether the buy-side believes the capex tape that hyperscalers are putting forward.
why.ja: AI インフラ系 IPO は AI capex テーゼに対する資本市場の信任を示すマーカー。値付けが、ハイパースケーラが示す capex のテープをバイサイドが信じているかどうかを語る。
why.es: Las IPOs de infraestructura de IA son la marca de validación del capital-markets para la tesis de capex de IA. El precio te dice si el buy-side cree la cinta de capex que los hyperscalers están presentando.
why.fil: Ang AI-infrastructure IPOs ang marker para sa capital-markets validation ng AI-capex thesis. Sinasabi ng pricing kung naniniwala ang buy-side sa capex tape na ipinakikita ng hyperscalers.

terms.quick_def: CISA's catalog of bugs that attackers are using right now. If your bug is on the list, US federal agencies have a hard deadline to patch.
terms.why_it_matters: Adds-to-KEV is the moment a CVE becomes a deadline-driven enterprise problem, not just a score on a list.

quick_def_locales.en: CISA's catalog of bugs that attackers are using right now. If your bug is on the list, US federal agencies have a hard deadline to patch.
quick_def_locales.ja: CISA が運営する、今まさに攻撃に使われているバグの一覧。リストに載ったバグは米連邦機関に厳しい修正期限が課される。
quick_def_locales.es: Catálogo de la CISA con los bugs que los atacantes están usando ahora. Si un bug aparece, las agencias federales de EE. UU. tienen un plazo estricto para parchear.
quick_def_locales.fil: Catalog ng CISA ng mga bug na ginagamit ng attackers ngayon. Pag nasa list ang bug, may mahigpit na deadline para i-patch ang US federal agencies.

why.en: Adds-to-KEV is the moment a CVE becomes a deadline-driven enterprise problem, not just a score on a list.
why.ja: KEV に追加された瞬間、CVE は単なるスコアから企業の対応期限を伴う問題に変わる。
why.es: El momento en que un CVE entra en KEV es cuando deja de ser una puntuación en una lista para convertirse en un problema empresarial con plazo.
why.fil: Pag pumasok sa KEV ang isang CVE, hindi na lang ito score sa list — nagiging deadline-driven na enterprise problem.

terms.quick_def: Memory the AI keeps for the words you've already said in the conversation, so it doesn't have to re-read them.
terms.why_it_matters: KV-cache size and reuse drive most of the cost and latency in serving long-context LLMs.

quick_def_locales.en: Memory the AI keeps for the words you've already said in the conversation, so it doesn't have to re-read them.
quick_def_locales.ja: AI が会話の中で既に話した単語を覚えておくメモリ。毎回読み直さなくて済むようにするため。
quick_def_locales.es: Memoria que la IA conserva de las palabras que ya has dicho, para no tener que releerlas.
quick_def_locales.fil: Memory na pinananatili ng AI para sa mga salitang nasabi mo na, para di na kailangan basahing muli.

why.en: KV-cache size and reuse drive most of the cost and latency in serving long-context LLMs.
why.ja: 長い文脈の LLM を動かすコストとレイテンシのほとんどは、KV-cache のサイズと再利用に支配される。
why.es: El tamaño y la reutilización del KV-cache dominan la mayor parte del coste y la latencia al servir LLMs con contexto largo.
why.fil: Pinangungunahan ng laki at reuse ng KV-cache ang karamihan ng cost at latency sa pag-serve ng long-context LLMs.

terms.quick_def: A neural network trained on huge amounts of text that can read, write, and reason about language. ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini are all LLMs.
terms.why_it_matters: Every prediction in this dashboard is downstream of LLM capability, cost, and security. The cost-curve and capability-curve drive the entire thesis.

quick_def_locales.en: A neural network trained on huge amounts of text that can read, write, and reason about language. ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini are all LLMs.
quick_def_locales.ja: 膨大なテキストで訓練され、言語を読み・書き・考えることができるニューラルネットワーク。ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini はいずれも LLM。
quick_def_locales.es: Una red neuronal entrenada con cantidades enormes de texto que puede leer, escribir y razonar sobre lenguaje. ChatGPT, Claude y Gemini son todos LLMs.
quick_def_locales.fil: Neural network na trained sa napakaraming text na kayang magbasa, magsulat, at mag-reason sa wika. LLMs ang ChatGPT, Claude, at Gemini.

why.en: Every prediction in this dashboard is downstream of LLM capability, cost, and security. The cost-curve and capability-curve drive the entire thesis.
why.ja: このダッシュボードの予測はすべて LLM の性能・コスト・セキュリティの下流にある。コスト曲線と性能曲線こそがテーゼ全体を駆動する。
why.es: Cada predicción en este panel es aguas abajo de la capacidad, el coste y la seguridad de los LLM. Las curvas de coste y capacidad impulsan toda la tesis.
why.fil: Lahat ng predictions sa dashboard na ito ay downstream ng LLM capability, cost, at security. Ang cost-curve at capability-curve ang nagtutulak sa buong thesis.

terms.quick_def: A shared way for AI assistants to talk to outside tools (files, search, GitHub). Like USB for AI.
terms.why_it_matters: If MCP wins, agents become portable across vendors. Otherwise we're stuck with vendor-specific glue.

quick_def_locales.en: A shared way for AI assistants to talk to outside tools (files, search, GitHub). Like USB for AI.
quick_def_locales.ja: AIアシスタントが外部のツール (ファイル、検索、GitHub) と話すための共通の仕組み。AI 用の USB のようなもの。
quick_def_locales.es: Una forma común de que los asistentes de IA hablen con herramientas externas (archivos, búsqueda, GitHub). Es como un USB para IA.
quick_def_locales.fil: Karaniwang paraan para makapag-usap ang mga AI assistant sa mga external na tool (files, search, GitHub). Parang USB para sa AI.

why.en: If MCP wins, agents become portable across vendors. Otherwise we're stuck with vendor-specific glue.
why.ja: MCP が普及すれば、エージェントはベンダー横断で動かしやすくなる。普及しなければ、ベンダー固有の繋ぎ込みに縛られる。
why.es: Si MCP se impone, los agentes serán portables entre proveedores. Si no, seguiremos atados a integraciones específicas de cada proveedor.
why.fil: Kung manalo ang MCP, magiging portable ang mga agent sa iba't ibang vendor. Kung hindi, mako-lock-in tayo sa vendor-specific glue code.

terms.quick_def: An organization MITRE has trusted to assign CVE IDs. Like a city issuing license plates for software bugs.
terms.why_it_matters: Once a vendor or domain (e.g. AI agents) has its own CNA, vulnerabilities get tracked formally — that gates enterprise risk transfer.

quick_def_locales.en: An organization MITRE has trusted to assign CVE IDs. Like a city issuing license plates for software bugs.
quick_def_locales.ja: MITRE が CVE ID の発行を任せている組織。市が車のナンバープレートを発行するように、ソフトウェアのバグに ID を発行する役割。
quick_def_locales.es: Una organización en la que MITRE confía para asignar IDs CVE. Como una ciudad que emite matrículas para los bugs de software.
quick_def_locales.fil: Organisasyon na pinagkakatiwalaan ng MITRE para mag-issue ng CVE ID. Parang siyudad na nag-i-issue ng license plate para sa mga software bug.

why.en: Once a vendor or domain (e.g. AI agents) has its own CNA, vulnerabilities get tracked formally — that gates enterprise risk transfer.
why.ja: ベンダーや領域 (例: AI エージェント) が自分の CNA を持つと、脆弱性が正式に追跡される — 企業のリスク移転の前提になる。
why.es: Cuando un proveedor o dominio (p. ej. agentes de IA) tiene su propio CNA, las vulnerabilidades se rastrean formalmente — base para la transferencia de riesgo empresarial.
why.fil: Kapag may sariling CNA ang isang vendor o domain (hal. AI agents), pormal na nasusubaybayan ang mga vulnerability — pundasyon ng enterprise risk transfer.

terms.quick_def: Wall Street nickname for the seven mega-cap tech stocks (Apple, Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, NVIDIA, Tesla) that have outsized weight in market indexes.
terms.why_it_matters: Their quarterly capex, AI-revenue disclosures, and buyback patterns drive the AI-infrastructure narrative end to end.

quick_def_locales.en: Wall Street nickname for the seven mega-cap tech stocks (Apple, Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, NVIDIA, Tesla) that have outsized weight in market indexes.
quick_def_locales.ja: ウォール街での呼称。市場指数に過大な比重を持つ大手テック 7 社 (Apple、Microsoft、Alphabet、Amazon、Meta、NVIDIA、Tesla) の総称。
quick_def_locales.es: Apodo de Wall Street para las siete megacapitalizadas tecnológicas (Apple, Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, NVIDIA, Tesla) con peso desproporcionado en los índices.
quick_def_locales.fil: Wall Street nickname para sa pitong mega-cap tech stocks (Apple, Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, NVIDIA, Tesla) na sobrang laki ng weight sa market indexes.

why.en: Their quarterly capex, AI-revenue disclosures, and buyback patterns drive the AI-infrastructure narrative end to end.
why.ja: 彼らの四半期 capex、AI 売上の開示、自社株買いの動向が AI インフラの物語全体を動かす。
why.es: Su capex trimestral, la divulgación de ingresos de IA y los patrones de recompra impulsan toda la narrativa de la infraestructura de IA.
why.fil: Ang quarterly capex, AI-revenue disclosures, at buyback patterns nila ang nagtutulak sa buong AI infrastructure narrative.

terms.quick_def: An open-source vendor-neutral self-hosted orchestrator for running multiple LLM profiles — different models, settings, and routes — from one place. The reference 'multi-profiling' tool for local LLMs.
terms.why_it_matters: Multi-profiling matters when User Prediction 2's 'cloud APIs for advanced + local LLMs for daily' split goes mainstream — Multica is the canonical open-source orchestrator pattern that split runs through. Project flag: news-driven coverage only.

quick_def_locales.en: An open-source vendor-neutral self-hosted orchestrator for running multiple LLM profiles — different models, settings, and routes — from one place. The reference 'multi-profiling' tool for local LLMs.
quick_def_locales.ja: ベンダ中立・自前ホスト型のオープンソース・オーケストレータで、複数の LLM プロファイル (モデル・設定・経路) を一箇所から運用するためのもの。ローカル LLM 向け「マルチプロファイリング」の標準実装。
quick_def_locales.es: Un orquestador de código abierto, neutral en proveedores y autoalojado para ejecutar múltiples perfiles de LLM — diferentes modelos, ajustes y rutas — desde un solo lugar. La herramienta de referencia de 'multi-profiling' para LLMs locales.
quick_def_locales.fil: Open-source, vendor-neutral, self-hosted orchestrator para mag-run ng multiple LLM profiles — iba't ibang models, settings, at routes — mula sa iisang lugar. Reference na 'multi-profiling' tool para sa local LLMs.

why.en: Multi-profiling matters when User Prediction 2's 'cloud APIs for advanced + local LLMs for daily' split goes mainstream — Multica is the canonical open-source orchestrator pattern that split runs through. Project flag: news-driven coverage only.
why.ja: User Prediction 2 の「高度処理はクラウド API、日常はローカル LLM」分業が主流化する際、マルチプロファイリングが意味を持つ。Multica はその分業を実装する代表的なオープンソース・オーケストレータ。プロジェクト規定はニュース駆動カバーのみ。
why.es: El multi-profiling importa cuando la división 'APIs cloud para avanzado + LLMs locales para diario' de la User Prediction 2 se vuelve mainstream — Multica es el patrón canónico de orquestador de código abierto a través del cual se ejecuta esa división. Marca del proyecto: cobertura solo guiada por noticias.
why.fil: Mahalaga ang multi-profiling pagdating ng split ng User Prediction 2 ('cloud APIs for advanced + local LLMs for daily') sa mainstream — Multica ang canonical open-source orchestrator pattern para sa split na yan. Project flag: news-driven coverage lang.

terms.quick_def: NIST's playbook for managing AI system risk — voluntary, but it's the document US federal agencies and many enterprises align procurement and audits to.
terms.why_it_matters: NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + ISO/IEC 42001 are the three reference frames CSAI's STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex aligns to — the regulatory triad agentic-AI compliance ends up triangulating against.

quick_def_locales.en: NIST's playbook for managing AI system risk — voluntary, but it's the document US federal agencies and many enterprises align procurement and audits to.
quick_def_locales.ja: AI システムリスク管理に関する NIST のプレイブック — 任意だが、米連邦機関と多くの企業が調達と監査を整合させる文書。
quick_def_locales.es: El manual de NIST para gestionar el riesgo de los sistemas de IA — voluntario, pero es el documento al que las agencias federales de EE. UU. y muchas empresas alinean adquisiciones y auditorías.
quick_def_locales.fil: Playbook ng NIST para sa pag-manage ng AI system risk — voluntary, pero ito ang dokumentong sinusunod ng US federal agencies at maraming enterprises sa procurement at audits.

why.en: NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + ISO/IEC 42001 are the three reference frames CSAI's STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex aligns to — the regulatory triad agentic-AI compliance ends up triangulating against.
why.ja: NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + ISO/IEC 42001 が CSAI STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex の参照する三つの枠組み — エージェント AI のコンプライアンスが結局は三角測量する規制トライアド。
why.es: NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + ISO/IEC 42001 son los tres marcos de referencia con los que se alinea el Annex STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk de CSAI — la tríada regulatoria contra la que la conformidad de IA agéntica acaba triangulando.
why.fil: Ang NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + ISO/IEC 42001 ang tatlong reference frames na inaayon ng CSAI STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex — ang regulatory triad na kinikilala ng agentic-AI compliance.

terms.quick_def: NVIDIA's enterprise-wrapped version of OpenClaw — adds audit logging, access control, and guardrails on top, plus NIM-based GPU-locked configuration.
terms.why_it_matters: NemoClaw normalizes OpenClaw's ecosystem for enterprise procurement. The 'breadth-with-guardrails' configuration the agent-control-plane thesis predicts becomes default in regulated buyers.

quick_def_locales.en: NVIDIA's enterprise-wrapped version of OpenClaw — adds audit logging, access control, and guardrails on top, plus NIM-based GPU-locked configuration.
quick_def_locales.ja: NVIDIA が OpenClaw を企業向けにラップした版 — 監査ログ、アクセス制御、ガードレールを追加し、NIM ベースの GPU 専有構成を持つ。
quick_def_locales.es: La versión de OpenClaw envuelta para empresas por NVIDIA — añade registro de auditoría, control de acceso y guardrails encima, más configuración GPU bloqueada basada en NIM.
quick_def_locales.fil: Enterprise-wrapped na bersyon ng OpenClaw ng NVIDIA — nagdagdag ng audit logging, access control, at guardrails, plus NIM-based GPU-locked configuration.

why.en: NemoClaw normalizes OpenClaw's ecosystem for enterprise procurement. The 'breadth-with-guardrails' configuration the agent-control-plane thesis predicts becomes default in regulated buyers.
why.ja: NemoClaw は OpenClaw のエコシステムを企業調達向けに整合させる。エージェント制御プレーンテーゼが予測する「ガードレール付き統合幅」構成が、規制対象バイヤーの既定値になる経路。
why.es: NemoClaw normaliza el ecosistema OpenClaw para la compra empresarial. La configuración 'amplitud con guardrails' que la tesis del plano de control de agentes predice se vuelve por defecto en compradores regulados.
why.fil: Pinapatatag ng NemoClaw ang ecosystem ng OpenClaw para sa enterprise procurement. Ang 'breadth-with-guardrails' configuration na hinuhulaan ng agent-control-plane thesis ay nagiging default sa regulated buyers.

terms.quick_def: An open-source AI agent harness — the scaffold around an LLM that runs tools, manages memory, and handles plans. Treats every problem as new (no built-in skill-learning layer). 346K+ GitHub stars.
terms.why_it_matters: OpenClaw is the breadth-of-integration reference point in the Agent Harness topic — Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI + ollama launch all hook into it. Microsoft Agent 365 names it as a local-agent integration path.

quick_def_locales.en: An open-source AI agent harness — the scaffold around an LLM that runs tools, manages memory, and handles plans. Treats every problem as new (no built-in skill-learning layer). 346K+ GitHub stars.
quick_def_locales.ja: オープンソースの AI エージェントハーネス — LLM の周りでツール実行・メモリ管理・計画処理を担う足場。問題を毎回ゼロから扱う方針 (スキル学習層は持たない)。GitHub スター 34.6 万超。
quick_def_locales.es: Un harness de agente IA de código abierto — el armazón alrededor de un LLM que ejecuta herramientas, gestiona memoria y planes. Trata cada problema como nuevo (sin capa de aprendizaje de skills). 346K+ stars en GitHub.
quick_def_locales.fil: Open-source AI agent harness — ang scaffold sa paligid ng LLM na nag-rurun ng tools, nag-mamanage ng memory, at humahawak ng plans. Tinuturing na bago ang bawat problema (walang built-in na skill-learning layer). 346K+ stars sa GitHub.

why.en: OpenClaw is the breadth-of-integration reference point in the Agent Harness topic — Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI + ollama launch all hook into it. Microsoft Agent 365 names it as a local-agent integration path.
why.ja: OpenClaw は Agent Harness トピックにおける「統合幅」の基準点 — Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI + ollama launch がいずれも統合する先。Microsoft Agent 365 はローカルエージェント統合経路として名指しする。
why.es: OpenClaw es el punto de referencia de 'amplitud de integración' en el tema Agent Harness — Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI + ollama launch se conectan a él. Microsoft Agent 365 lo nombra como vía de integración de agentes locales.
why.fil: Ang OpenClaw ang breadth-of-integration reference point sa Agent Harness topic — Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI + ollama launch ay nag-a-attach dito. Pinapangalanan ito ng Microsoft Agent 365 bilang local-agent integration path.

terms.quick_def: AI that lives in physical machines — humanoid robots, factory arms, autonomous construction robots. Tesla Optimus, Apptronik Apollo, Figure, and Atlas are marquee examples.
terms.why_it_matters: Physical AI is the first hyperscaler-style physical-AI capex commitment surface — large-scale humanoid factory nameplates and datacenter-construction robot programs are the structural markers.

quick_def_locales.en: AI that lives in physical machines — humanoid robots, factory arms, autonomous construction robots. Tesla Optimus, Apptronik Apollo, Figure, and Atlas are marquee examples.
quick_def_locales.ja: 物理的な機械に宿る AI — ヒューマノイドロボット、工場アーム、自律建設ロボットなど。代表例は Tesla Optimus、Apptronik Apollo、Figure、Atlas。
quick_def_locales.es: IA que vive en máquinas físicas — robots humanoides, brazos de fábrica, robots de construcción autónomos. Tesla Optimus, Apptronik Apollo, Figure y Atlas son ejemplos estelares.
quick_def_locales.fil: AI na nakatira sa pisikal na mga makina — humanoid robots, factory arms, autonomous construction robots. Tesla Optimus, Apptronik Apollo, Figure, at Atlas ang marquee examples.

why.en: Physical AI is the first hyperscaler-style physical-AI capex commitment surface — large-scale humanoid factory nameplates and datacenter-construction robot programs are the structural markers.
why.ja: Physical AI はハイパースケーラ型の物理 AI 設備投資コミットが初めて可視化される面 — 大規模なヒューマノイド工場のスレートやデータセンター建設ロボットのプログラムが構造的マーカー。
why.es: Physical AI es la primera superficie de compromisos de capex de IA física estilo hyperscaler — las placas de fábricas humanoides a gran escala y los programas de robots de construcción de centros de datos son los marcadores estructurales.
why.fil: Ang Physical AI ang first surface ng hyperscaler-style physical-AI capex commitment — ang large-scale humanoid factory nameplates at datacenter-construction robot programs ang structural markers.

terms.quick_def: An AI pattern where the model looks up relevant documents before answering, instead of relying only on what it memorized during training. Lets it cite fresh, specific facts.
terms.why_it_matters: RAG is how enterprise AI gets to use private data without retraining. Q-RAG and similar extensions with RL-trained retrievers are operative research-side evidence for User Prediction 3.

quick_def_locales.en: An AI pattern where the model looks up relevant documents before answering, instead of relying only on what it memorized during training. Lets it cite fresh, specific facts.
quick_def_locales.ja: 回答前にモデルが関連文書を検索し、訓練時の記憶だけに頼らず答える AI パターン。新鮮で具体的な事実を引用させられる。
quick_def_locales.es: Un patrón de IA en el que el modelo busca documentos relevantes antes de responder, en vez de depender solo de lo que memorizó durante el entrenamiento. Permite citar hechos frescos y específicos.
quick_def_locales.fil: AI pattern kung saan tumitingin ang model sa relevant na documents bago sumagot, sa halip na umasa lang sa nakabaong sa training. Para makapag-cite ng fresh at specific na facts.

why.en: RAG is how enterprise AI gets to use private data without retraining. Q-RAG and similar extensions with RL-trained retrievers are operative research-side evidence for User Prediction 3.
why.ja: RAG は企業の AI が再訓練なしに自社データを使うための手段。Q-RAG など RL 訓練済みリトリーバーによる拡張が、User Prediction 3 の研究側エビデンス。
why.es: RAG es la forma en que la IA empresarial usa datos privados sin reentrenar. Q-RAG y extensiones similares con retrievers entrenados por RL son evidencia operativa del lado investigación para la User Prediction 3.
why.fil: Ang RAG ang paraan ng enterprise AI para magamit ang private data nang hindi nagre-retrain. Ang Q-RAG at mga katulad na extensions gamit ang RL-trained retrievers ay operative research-side evidence para sa User Prediction 3.

terms.quick_def: A bug class where an attacker can run their own code on someone else's server over the network. The worst kind of bug for everyone except the attacker.
terms.why_it_matters: RCE is the structural ceiling for severity — most CVSS 9-10 scores live here. AI-stack RCEs in inference servers and model-tooling layers are why these CVEs draw outsized enterprise attention.

quick_def_locales.en: A bug class where an attacker can run their own code on someone else's server over the network. The worst kind of bug for everyone except the attacker.
quick_def_locales.ja: 攻撃者がネットワーク越しに他人のサーバーで自分のコードを実行できてしまうバグの種類。攻撃者以外の全員にとって最悪のバグ。
quick_def_locales.es: Una clase de bug en la que un atacante puede ejecutar su propio código en el servidor de otra persona a través de la red. El peor tipo de bug para todos menos el atacante.
quick_def_locales.fil: Klase ng bug kung saan kayang patakbuhin ng attacker ang sariling code sa server ng iba sa network. Pinakamasamang klase ng bug para sa lahat maliban sa attacker.

why.en: RCE is the structural ceiling for severity — most CVSS 9-10 scores live here. AI-stack RCEs in inference servers and model-tooling layers are why these CVEs draw outsized enterprise attention.
why.ja: RCE は深刻度の構造的な天井 — CVSS 9-10 のほとんどはここに集まる。推論サーバとモデルツール層で発生する AI スタック RCE が、その CVE が企業から過大な注目を集める理由。
why.es: RCE es el techo estructural de la severidad — la mayoría de las puntuaciones CVSS 9-10 viven aquí. Los RCE en la pila de IA en servidores de inferencia y capas de herramientas de modelo explican por qué estos CVE atraen tanta atención empresarial.
why.fil: Ang RCE ang structural ceiling ng severity — karamihan ng CVSS 9-10 scores ay narito. Ang AI-stack RCEs sa inference servers at model-tooling layers ang dahilan kung bakit nakakakuha ng laki ng enterprise attention ang mga CVE na ito.

terms.quick_def: An ingredients list for software — every library, version, and dependency it uses. Lets you ask 'is the bad component anywhere in our stack?' in seconds, not weeks.
terms.why_it_matters: SBOM-style provenance is the substrate every CNA-issued AI-agent compliance regime ends up requiring. Without it, agentic-AI risk transfer is impossible at enterprise scale.

quick_def_locales.en: An ingredients list for software — every library, version, and dependency it uses. Lets you ask 'is the bad component anywhere in our stack?' in seconds, not weeks.
quick_def_locales.ja: ソフトウェアの「成分表」— 使われているすべてのライブラリ・バージョン・依存関係を列挙したもの。「あの脆弱な部品はうちのスタックのどこに入っている?」を週単位ではなく秒単位で答えられる。
quick_def_locales.es: Una lista de ingredientes del software — cada biblioteca, versión y dependencia que usa. Permite preguntar '¿está el componente malo en algún lugar de nuestra pila?' en segundos, no semanas.
quick_def_locales.fil: Listahan ng sangkap ng software — bawat library, version, at dependency na gamit nito. Nagbibigay-daan na itanong ang 'nasaan kaya sa stack natin yung masamang component?' sa loob ng segundo, hindi linggo.

why.en: SBOM-style provenance is the substrate every CNA-issued AI-agent compliance regime ends up requiring. Without it, agentic-AI risk transfer is impossible at enterprise scale.
why.ja: SBOM 型の出所追跡は、CNA 発行の AI エージェント・コンプライアンス体制が結局必ず要求する基盤。これが無いと、エージェント AI のリスク移転は企業規模では成立しない。
why.es: La trazabilidad estilo SBOM es el sustrato que todo régimen de cumplimiento para agentes de IA emitido por una CNA termina exigiendo. Sin él, la transferencia de riesgo de IA agéntica es imposible a escala empresarial.
why.fil: Ang SBOM-style provenance ang substrate na hinihingi sa huli ng bawat CNA-issued AI-agent compliance regime. Kung wala ito, imposibleng ma-transfer sa enterprise scale ang agentic-AI risk.

terms.quick_def: The US regulator that oversees public stock markets — sets disclosure rules, polices fraud, and enforces what companies must report in 10-Q and 10-K filings.
terms.why_it_matters: An SEC AI-revenue concept release (Pred #3) is the operative regulatory escalation that turns the disclosure-rewrite thesis from buy-side pressure into a rule-text deadline.

quick_def_locales.en: The US regulator that oversees public stock markets — sets disclosure rules, polices fraud, and enforces what companies must report in 10-Q and 10-K filings.
quick_def_locales.ja: 米国の公開株式市場を監督する規制当局 — 開示ルールを定め、不正を取り締まり、10-Q や 10-K で企業が何を報告すべきかを執行する。
quick_def_locales.es: El regulador estadounidense que supervisa los mercados de acciones cotizadas — fija reglas de divulgación, persigue el fraude y exige lo que las empresas deben reportar en los informes 10-Q y 10-K.
quick_def_locales.fil: US regulator na nagba-bantay sa public stock markets — nagtatakda ng disclosure rules, humuhuli ng fraud, at nagpapatupad sa kung ano ang kailangang i-report ng companies sa 10-Q at 10-K filings.

why.en: An SEC AI-revenue concept release (Pred #3) is the operative regulatory escalation that turns the disclosure-rewrite thesis from buy-side pressure into a rule-text deadline.
why.ja: SEC の「AI 売上コンセプトリリース」(予測 #3) が、開示書き換えテーゼをバイサイド圧力から規制文言の期限に変える運用上の規制エスカレーション。
why.es: Un concept release del SEC sobre ingresos de IA (Pred #3) es la escalada regulatoria operativa que convierte la tesis de reescritura de divulgación de presión del buy-side a un plazo de texto regulatorio.
why.fil: Ang SEC AI-revenue concept release (Pred #3) ang operative regulatory escalation na ginagawang disclosure-rewrite thesis mula buy-side pressure papasok sa rule-text deadline.

terms.quick_def: Another open-source inference server, sibling to vLLM, focused on structured generation and high-throughput serving. Widely used in private LLM deployments for performance-critical workloads.
terms.why_it_matters: SGLang sits in the same inference-server CVE class as vLLM and LiteLLM — its CVE and patch cadence is part of the operative signal for the inference-server-as-supply-chain thesis.

quick_def_locales.en: Another open-source inference server, sibling to vLLM, focused on structured generation and high-throughput serving. Widely used in private LLM deployments for performance-critical workloads.
quick_def_locales.ja: vLLM の同系統オープンソース推論サーバー。構造化生成と高スループット配信に注力。性能重視のプライベート LLM 配備で広く使われている。
quick_def_locales.es: Otro servidor de inferencia de código abierto, hermano de vLLM, enfocado en generación estructurada y servicio de alto rendimiento. Muy usado en despliegues privados de LLM para cargas críticas de rendimiento.
quick_def_locales.fil: Isa pang open-source inference server, kapatid ng vLLM, naka-focus sa structured generation at high-throughput serving. Madalas gamitin sa private LLM deployments para sa performance-critical workloads.

why.en: SGLang sits in the same inference-server CVE class as vLLM and LiteLLM — its CVE and patch cadence is part of the operative signal for the inference-server-as-supply-chain thesis.
why.ja: SGLang は vLLM や LiteLLM と同じ推論サーバ CVE クラスに属する — その CVE とパッチの動向は「推論サーバがプリミティブなサプライチェーン」テーゼの運用上のシグナル。
why.es: SGLang pertenece a la misma clase CVE de servidores de inferencia que vLLM y LiteLLM — su cadencia de CVE y parches es parte de la señal operativa de la tesis del servidor de inferencia como cadena de suministro primitiva.
why.fil: Ang SGLang ay nasa parehong inference-server CVE class ng vLLM at LiteLLM — ang CVE at patch cadence nito ay bahagi ng operative signal para sa inference-server-as-supply-chain thesis.

terms.quick_def: A written promise about how often a service will be available and how fast it will respond.
terms.why_it_matters: Determines how much an AI vendor pays you back when their service fails. The teeth behind every cloud contract.

quick_def_locales.en: A written promise about how often a service will be available and how fast it will respond.
quick_def_locales.ja: サービスがどのくらい使えて、どのくらい速く応えるかについての書面の約束。
quick_def_locales.es: Una promesa escrita sobre con qué frecuencia estará disponible un servicio y con qué rapidez responderá.
quick_def_locales.fil: Nakasulat na promise tungkol sa kung gaano kadalas ma-aavailable ang isang service at kung gaano kabilis sumagot.

why.en: Determines how much an AI vendor pays you back when their service fails. The teeth behind every cloud contract.
why.ja: AI ベンダーがサービスを止めたときに払う返金額を決める。すべてのクラウド契約の歯がここに集まる。
why.es: Determina cuánto te devuelve un proveedor de IA cuando falla su servicio. Es el 'diente' detrás de cada contrato cloud.
why.fil: Tinutukoy nito kung magkano ang ibabalik ng AI vendor pag pumalpak ang service nila. Ito ang ngipin sa likod ng bawat cloud contract.

terms.quick_def: A bug class where user input gets concatenated into a database query, letting an attacker rewrite the query and steal or modify data. The web's oldest never-fully-fixed bug class.
terms.why_it_matters: Pre-auth SQLi against AI-routing or proxy layers can expose credentials for multiple downstream model providers in a single query — making AI-stack SQLi a pan-vendor blast-radius risk rather than a single-vendor incident.

quick_def_locales.en: A bug class where user input gets concatenated into a database query, letting an attacker rewrite the query and steal or modify data. The web's oldest never-fully-fixed bug class.
quick_def_locales.ja: ユーザー入力がそのまま DB クエリに連結され、攻撃者がクエリを書き換えてデータを盗んだり改変したりできるバグの種類。Web で最も古く、未だに完全に消えないバグ種類。
quick_def_locales.es: Una clase de bug en la que la entrada del usuario se concatena en una consulta de base de datos, permitiendo al atacante reescribir la consulta y robar o modificar datos. La clase de bug más antigua de la web nunca del todo arreglada.
quick_def_locales.fil: Klase ng bug kung saan dinurugtong ang user input sa database query, kaya kayang i-rewrite ng attacker ang query at magnakaw o magbago ng data. Pinakamatandang web bug class na hindi pa fully naayos.

why.en: Pre-auth SQLi against AI-routing or proxy layers can expose credentials for multiple downstream model providers in a single query — making AI-stack SQLi a pan-vendor blast-radius risk rather than a single-vendor incident.
why.ja: AI のルーティング層やプロキシ層に対する事前認証 SQLi は、1 クエリで複数の下流モデルプロバイダの認証情報を露出させうる — AI スタックの SQLi は単一ベンダー事件ではなく全ベンダー横断の被害範囲リスク。
why.es: El SQLi preautenticación contra capas de enrutamiento o proxy de IA puede exponer credenciales para múltiples proveedores de modelos aguas abajo en una sola consulta — convirtiendo al SQLi en la pila de IA en un riesgo de radio de impacto multi-proveedor, no un incidente de un solo proveedor.
why.fil: Ang pre-auth SQLi laban sa AI-routing o proxy layers ay pwedeng mag-expose ng credentials para sa maraming downstream model providers sa isang query — kaya pan-vendor blast-radius risk ang AI-stack SQLi, hindi single-vendor incident.

terms.quick_def: A bug class where user input gets evaluated as code by a server-side template engine — so 'hello' isn't shown as text, it gets executed. The bridge from web bug to RCE.
terms.why_it_matters: Inference-server SSTI (LiteLLM, vLLM, SGLang) is a recognized AI-stack attack pattern: model-tooling-layer template injection bridging from prompt path into RCE / token theft.

quick_def_locales.en: A bug class where user input gets evaluated as code by a server-side template engine — so 'hello' isn't shown as text, it gets executed. The bridge from web bug to RCE.
quick_def_locales.ja: ユーザー入力がサーバ側テンプレートエンジンによってコードとして評価されてしまうバグの種類 — 入力が文字列ではなくコードとして実行される。Web バグから RCE への橋渡し。
quick_def_locales.es: Una clase de bug en la que la entrada del usuario se evalúa como código por un motor de plantillas del lado del servidor — así 'hello' no se muestra como texto, se ejecuta. El puente del bug web al RCE.
quick_def_locales.fil: Klase ng bug kung saan ang user input ay ina-evaluate bilang code ng server-side template engine — kaya hindi text na 'hello' ang lumalabas, ie-execute ito. Tulay mula sa web bug papunta sa RCE.

why.en: Inference-server SSTI (LiteLLM, vLLM, SGLang) is a recognized AI-stack attack pattern: model-tooling-layer template injection bridging from prompt path into RCE / token theft.
why.ja: 推論サーバの SSTI (LiteLLM、vLLM、SGLang) は AI スタックで認知された攻撃パターン — モデルツール層のテンプレートインジェクションがプロンプト経路から RCE / トークン窃取へ橋渡しする。
why.es: El SSTI en servidores de inferencia (LiteLLM, vLLM, SGLang) es un patrón de ataque reconocido de la pila de IA: inyección de plantilla en la capa de herramientas del modelo, puente desde la ruta de prompt hasta RCE / robo de tokens.
why.fil: Ang inference-server SSTI (LiteLLM, vLLM, SGLang) ay kinikilalang attack pattern sa AI stack: template injection sa model-tooling-layer, tulay mula prompt path papuntang RCE / token theft.

terms.quick_def: A way to shrink an AI model so it runs on tiny hardware while keeping most of its smarts.
terms.why_it_matters: The latest in a long line of quantization tricks. If it sticks, more inference moves to local devices and less to cloud.

quick_def_locales.en: A way to shrink an AI model so it runs on tiny hardware while keeping most of its smarts.
quick_def_locales.ja: AI モデルを小さくして、スマホや小さな PC でもそれなりに賢く動くようにする方法。
quick_def_locales.es: Una forma de encoger un modelo de IA para que corra en hardware pequeño manteniendo casi toda su inteligencia.
quick_def_locales.fil: Paraan para liitan ang AI model para tumakbo sa maliit na hardware habang panatilihin ang halos buong galing.

why.en: The latest in a long line of quantization tricks. If it sticks, more inference moves to local devices and less to cloud.
why.ja: 量子化の系譜のひとつ。定着すれば、推論はクラウドからローカルデバイスへ徐々に移る。
why.es: La última de una larga línea de trucos de cuantización. Si cuaja, más inferencia se mueve a dispositivos locales y menos a la nube.
why.fil: Pinakabago sa mahabang linya ng quantization tricks. Kung mag-stick, mas marami sa inference ang lilipat sa local devices, kaysa sa cloud.

terms.quick_def: An open-source library that makes fine-tuning LLMs much faster and cheaper, especially on a single GPU. The default fine-tuning toolkit for the local-LLM crowd.
terms.why_it_matters: Unsloth is a constant-coverage daily-update topic — its release cadence is the operative pulse of the local-LLM-for-daily-use leg of User Prediction 2.

quick_def_locales.en: An open-source library that makes fine-tuning LLMs much faster and cheaper, especially on a single GPU. The default fine-tuning toolkit for the local-LLM crowd.
quick_def_locales.ja: LLM のファインチューニングを (特に単一 GPU 環境で) 大幅に高速化・低コスト化するオープンソースライブラリ。ローカル LLM コミュニティの標準ファインチューニングツール。
quick_def_locales.es: Una biblioteca de código abierto que hace el fine-tuning de LLMs mucho más rápido y barato, especialmente en una sola GPU. El kit de fine-tuning por defecto para la comunidad de LLMs locales.
quick_def_locales.fil: Open-source library na ginagawang mas mabilis at mas mura ang fine-tuning ng LLMs, lalo na sa single GPU. Ang default na fine-tuning toolkit para sa local-LLM community.

why.en: Unsloth is a constant-coverage daily-update topic — its release cadence is the operative pulse of the local-LLM-for-daily-use leg of User Prediction 2.
why.ja: Unsloth はデイリーアップデートの常時カバー対象 — そのリリース頻度が User Prediction 2「日常用途はローカル LLM」軸の実運用上の脈拍。
why.es: Unsloth es un tema de cobertura constante en la actualización diaria — su cadencia de lanzamientos es el pulso operativo de la pata 'LLM local para uso diario' de la User Prediction 2.
why.fil: Constant-coverage topic ang Unsloth sa daily update — ang release cadence nito ay operative pulse ng local-LLM-for-daily-use leg ng User Prediction 2.

terms.quick_def: A live measure of how much the market expects stocks to swing over the next 30 days, derived from S&P 500 option prices. Low VIX = calm; high VIX = panic.
terms.why_it_matters: VIX paired with WTI and earnings tape is how the dashboard reads macro stress on the AI-capex thesis. VIX 16.99 with WTI +12% week is the 'volatile macro week' marker.

quick_def_locales.en: A live measure of how much the market expects stocks to swing over the next 30 days, derived from S&P 500 option prices. Low VIX = calm; high VIX = panic.
quick_def_locales.ja: S&P 500 オプション価格から導く、向こう 30 日の株価変動への市場期待値の指標。低い VIX は平穏、高い VIX はパニック。
quick_def_locales.es: Una medida en vivo de cuánto espera el mercado que oscilen las acciones en los próximos 30 días, derivada de los precios de opciones del S&P 500. VIX bajo = calma; VIX alto = pánico.
quick_def_locales.fil: Live na sukat kung gaano umasa ang market na maglulundag-lundag ang mga stock sa susunod na 30 araw, kinukuha sa option prices ng S&P 500. Mababang VIX = kalmado; mataas na VIX = panic.

why.en: VIX paired with WTI and earnings tape is how the dashboard reads macro stress on the AI-capex thesis. VIX 16.99 with WTI +12% week is the 'volatile macro week' marker.
why.ja: VIX、WTI、決算テープを組み合わせて、ダッシュボードは AI capex テーゼへのマクロ・ストレスを読む。VIX 16.99 + WTI 週 +12% は「マクロ波乱週」のマーカー。
why.es: Combinar VIX con WTI y la cinta de resultados es como el panel lee el estrés macro sobre la tesis de capex de IA. VIX 16.99 con WTI +12% semanal es el marcador de 'semana macro volátil'.
why.fil: Ang pagpa-pares ng VIX sa WTI at earnings tape ang paraan ng dashboard para basahin ang macro stress sa AI-capex thesis. Ang VIX 16.99 + WTI +12% per week ay marker ng 'volatile macro week'.

terms.quick_def: Google Cloud's managed platform for AI models and agents — the place to call Gemini, host your own model, or build agents on top of Google infrastructure.
terms.why_it_matters: Anthropic shipping Opus 4.7 across API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Foundry is the canonical 'frontier on every cloud' pattern. Vertex AI is Google's leg of that triangle.

quick_def_locales.en: Google Cloud's managed platform for AI models and agents — the place to call Gemini, host your own model, or build agents on top of Google infrastructure.
quick_def_locales.ja: Google Cloud の AI モデル・エージェント向けマネージド基盤 — Gemini の呼び出し、自前モデルのホスト、Google インフラ上のエージェント構築の窓口。
quick_def_locales.es: Plataforma gestionada de Google Cloud para modelos y agentes de IA — el lugar para llamar a Gemini, alojar tu propio modelo o construir agentes sobre la infraestructura de Google.
quick_def_locales.fil: Managed platform ng Google Cloud para sa AI models at agents — ang lugar para tumawag sa Gemini, mag-host ng sariling model, o mag-build ng agents sa Google infrastructure.

why.en: Anthropic shipping Opus 4.7 across API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Foundry is the canonical 'frontier on every cloud' pattern. Vertex AI is Google's leg of that triangle.
why.ja: Anthropic が Opus 4.7 を API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Foundry で展開しているのが「すべてのクラウドにフロンティア」の定番パターン。Vertex AI はその三角形の Google 側の脚。
why.es: Anthropic publicando Opus 4.7 a través de API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Foundry es el patrón canónico de 'frontier en cada nube'. Vertex AI es la pata de Google en ese triángulo.
why.fil: Ang pag-deploy ng Anthropic ng Opus 4.7 sa API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Foundry ang canonical 'frontier on every cloud' pattern. Ang Vertex AI ang Google leg ng triangle na yan.

terms.quick_def: The benchmark price for US crude oil — the headline number in oil-price news stories. Set in financial markets, watched globally.
terms.why_it_matters: WTI prices, geopolitical sanction regimes, and US jobs prints are the recurring macro stress-tests the AI-capex tape weathers. Sharp energy bids feed directly into the discount-rate side of every AI-capex valuation.

quick_def_locales.en: The benchmark price for US crude oil — the headline number in oil-price news stories. Set in financial markets, watched globally.
quick_def_locales.ja: 米国産原油のベンチマーク価格 — 原油価格関連の見出しに登場する数字。金融市場で形成され、世界中が注目する。
quick_def_locales.es: El precio de referencia del crudo estadounidense — la cifra titular en las historias sobre el precio del petróleo. Se fija en los mercados financieros y se sigue globalmente.
quick_def_locales.fil: Benchmark price para sa US crude oil — ang headline number sa mga storya tungkol sa oil prices. Itinatakda sa financial markets at minamatyagan ng buong mundo.

why.en: WTI prices, geopolitical sanction regimes, and US jobs prints are the recurring macro stress-tests the AI-capex tape weathers. Sharp energy bids feed directly into the discount-rate side of every AI-capex valuation.
why.ja: WTI 価格、地政学的な制裁レジーム、米国雇用統計が AI capex テープが受ける反復的なマクロ・ストレステスト。鋭いエネルギー高は、AI capex 評価における割引率側に直接効く。
why.es: Los precios del WTI, los regímenes de sanciones geopolíticas y los datos de empleo de EE. UU. son las pruebas de estrés macro recurrentes que la cinta de capex de IA aguanta. Las apuestas energéticas fuertes se trasladan directamente al lado del tipo de descuento de cada valoración de capex de IA.
why.fil: Ang WTI prices, geopolitical sanction regimes, at US jobs prints ang recurring macro stress-tests na pinagdadaanan ng AI-capex tape. Ang sharp energy bids ay direktang pumapasok sa discount-rate side ng bawat AI-capex valuation.

terms.quick_def: Comparing one period to the same period one year earlier — e.g. this Q1 vs Q1 a year ago. Strips out seasonal effects so you see real growth.
terms.why_it_matters: Earnings prints headline YoY revenue and EPS — large YoY comparables are the cleanest signal for whether a product cycle is feeding through to revenue.

quick_def_locales.en: Comparing one period to the same period one year earlier — e.g. this Q1 vs Q1 a year ago. Strips out seasonal effects so you see real growth.
quick_def_locales.ja: ある期間と 1 年前の同期を比較する手法 — 例えば、今年の Q1 と前年の Q1 を比べる。季節要因を除き、真の成長を見せる。
quick_def_locales.es: Comparar un periodo con el mismo periodo de un año antes — p.ej. este Q1 vs el Q1 de hace un año. Elimina los efectos estacionales para ver el crecimiento real.
quick_def_locales.fil: Pagkumpara ng isang period sa parehong period isang taon nakaraan — hal. Q1 ngayon vs Q1 isang taon nakaraan. Tinatanggal ang seasonal effects para makita ang totoong growth.

why.en: Earnings prints headline YoY revenue and EPS — large YoY comparables are the cleanest signal for whether a product cycle is feeding through to revenue.
why.ja: 決算発表は YoY の売上と EPS が見出しになる — 大きな YoY の比較指標こそが、製品サイクルが売上に反映されているかを示す最も明快なシグナル。
why.es: Los informes de resultados encabezan con ingresos y EPS YoY — los grandes comparables YoY son la señal más clara de si un ciclo de producto se está trasladando a los ingresos.
why.fil: Sa earnings prints, headline ang YoY revenue at EPS — ang malalaking YoY comparables ang pinakamalinaw na signal kung tumatagos sa revenue ang isang product cycle.

terms.quick_def: A security model that assumes no user, device, or service is automatically trusted — every action is verified, even from inside the network. Never trust, always verify.
terms.why_it_matters: Zero-trust applied to AI agents is the User Prediction 1 thesis. Microsoft Agent 365 and CSA's Identity-as-first-pillar are the operative deployment surface.

quick_def_locales.en: A security model that assumes no user, device, or service is automatically trusted — every action is verified, even from inside the network. Never trust, always verify.
quick_def_locales.ja: ユーザー・端末・サービスを自動的には信用しないセキュリティモデル — ネットワーク内部からのアクセスでも毎回検証する。「信用するな、常に検証せよ」。
quick_def_locales.es: Un modelo de seguridad que asume que ningún usuario, dispositivo o servicio es automáticamente de confianza — cada acción se verifica, incluso desde dentro de la red. Nunca confíes, siempre verifica.
quick_def_locales.fil: Security model na walang user, device, o service na automatic na pinagkakatiwalaan — bawat action ay vine-verify, kahit galing sa loob ng network. 'Wag magtiwala, laging i-verify.

why.en: Zero-trust applied to AI agents is the User Prediction 1 thesis. Microsoft Agent 365 and CSA's Identity-as-first-pillar are the operative deployment surface.
why.ja: AI エージェントへの Zero Trust 適用は User Prediction 1 の主張そのもの。Microsoft Agent 365 と CSA の「Identity を Zero Trust の第一の柱に」が実運用の場。
why.es: El zero-trust aplicado a agentes de IA es la tesis de la User Prediction 1. Microsoft Agent 365 y la postura Identity-como-primer-pilar de CSA son la superficie operativa.
why.fil: Ang zero-trust applied sa AI agents ang User Prediction 1 thesis. Microsoft Agent 365 at Identity-as-first-pillar ng CSA ang operative deployment surface.

terms.quick_def: The scaffolding around an LLM that lets it do real work — the part that handles tool calls, memory, retries, and sandboxing. The model is the engine; the harness is the car.
terms.why_it_matters: Most production agent failures live in the harness, not the model. Whoever owns the harness owns the agent's behavior surface — and its CVE surface.

quick_def_locales.en: The scaffolding around an LLM that lets it do real work — the part that handles tool calls, memory, retries, and sandboxing. The model is the engine; the harness is the car.
quick_def_locales.ja: LLM が実作業をするために周りに用意する足場 — ツール呼び出し、メモリ、再試行、サンドボックスを処理する部分。モデルがエンジンなら、ハーネスは車そのもの。
quick_def_locales.es: El armazón alrededor de un LLM que le permite hacer trabajo real — la parte que gestiona llamadas a herramientas, memoria, reintentos y sandboxing. El modelo es el motor; el harness es el coche.
quick_def_locales.fil: Ang scaffolding sa paligid ng LLM para makapag-trabaho talaga — yung parte na humahawak sa tool calls, memory, retries, at sandboxing. Engine ang model; ang harness ang kotse mismo.

why.en: Most production agent failures live in the harness, not the model. Whoever owns the harness owns the agent's behavior surface — and its CVE surface.
why.ja: 本番のエージェント障害の大半はモデルではなくハーネスで起きる。ハーネスを握る者がエージェントの挙動と CVE の表面を握る。
why.es: La mayoría de los fallos de agentes en producción están en el harness, no en el modelo. Quien controla el harness controla la superficie de comportamiento — y la superficie CVE — del agente.
why.fil: Karamihan ng production agent failures ay nasa harness, hindi sa model. Sinumang may control sa harness ang may control sa behavior surface — at CVE surface — ng agent.

terms.quick_def: AI that takes its own actions in a loop — read a webpage, decide to call a tool, check the result, try again — instead of just answering one question at a time.
terms.why_it_matters: Agentic systems multiply blast radius and value at the same time. Every prediction in the security and capex categories assumes this loop is the next mainstream interface.

quick_def_locales.en: AI that takes its own actions in a loop — read a webpage, decide to call a tool, check the result, try again — instead of just answering one question at a time.
quick_def_locales.ja: AI が自分で動作を繰り返す形 — Web ページを読み、ツールを呼ぶか判断し、結果を確認し、もう一度試す — 単発の質問応答ではない使い方。
quick_def_locales.es: IA que toma sus propias acciones en bucle — leer una página, decidir llamar a una herramienta, comprobar el resultado, reintentar — en lugar de solo responder una pregunta a la vez.
quick_def_locales.fil: AI na nakakagawa ng sariling actions sa loop — magbasa ng webpage, magdesisyon kung tatawag ng tool, susuriin ang resulta, susubukan ulit — hindi lang basta sumagot ng isang tanong.

why.en: Agentic systems multiply blast radius and value at the same time. Every prediction in the security and capex categories assumes this loop is the next mainstream interface.
why.ja: エージェント型は被害範囲も価値も同時に大きくする。セキュリティと capex 系の予測はすべて、このループが次のメイン UI になることを前提にしている。
why.es: Los sistemas agénticos amplifican el radio de impacto y el valor a la vez. Cada predicción en seguridad y capex asume que este bucle será la próxima interfaz dominante.
why.fil: Pinapalaki ng agentic systems ang blast radius at value sabay. Lahat ng predictions sa security at capex assume na ang loop na ito ang susunod na mainstream interface.

terms.quick_def: An open-access preprint server where researchers publish papers before — or instead of — formal peer review. The default frontline for AI research; cited as 'arxiv 2604.XXXXX'.
terms.why_it_matters: Most LLM/agent research lands on arxiv first; the substrate-densification signal in User Prediction 3 reads as 'cluster of arxiv ids in one design surface in one week'.

quick_def_locales.en: An open-access preprint server where researchers publish papers before — or instead of — formal peer review. The default frontline for AI research; cited as 'arxiv 2604.XXXXX'.
quick_def_locales.ja: 正式なピアレビュー前 (または代わり) に研究者が論文を公開するオープンアクセスのプレプリントサーバー。AI 研究の標準的な最前線で、「arxiv 2604.XXXXX」と引用される。
quick_def_locales.es: Un servidor de preprints de acceso abierto donde los investigadores publican artículos antes — o en lugar — de la revisión por pares formal. El frente predeterminado de la investigación en IA; citado como 'arxiv 2604.XXXXX'.
quick_def_locales.fil: Open-access preprint server kung saan inilalathala ng mga researcher ang papers bago — o sa halip na — formal peer review. Default na frontline ng AI research; sinasanggunian bilang 'arxiv 2604.XXXXX'.

why.en: Most LLM/agent research lands on arxiv first; the substrate-densification signal in User Prediction 3 reads as 'cluster of arxiv ids in one design surface in one week'.
why.ja: LLM/エージェント研究の多くはまず arxiv に投稿される。User Prediction 3 の基盤密度信号は「同じ設計領域に 1 週間で arxiv ID が群がる」現象として読まれる。
why.es: La mayoría de la investigación sobre LLM/agentes aterriza primero en arxiv; la señal de densificación del sustrato en la User Prediction 3 se lee como 'racimo de IDs de arxiv en una sola superficie de diseño en una sola semana'.
why.fil: Karamihan sa LLM/agent research ay naka-arxiv muna; ang substrate-densification signal sa User Prediction 3 ay binabasa bilang 'cluster ng arxiv ids sa isang design surface sa isang linggo'.

terms.quick_def: When a company uses its cash to buy back its own shares, removing them from circulation. Each remaining share represents a slightly bigger slice of the company.
terms.why_it_matters: Buyback authorizations signal management's confidence in cash flow. Mega-cap buybacks running alongside hyperscaler AI-capex commitments are the cohort signal that capex is underwritten by capital-return capacity.

quick_def_locales.en: When a company uses its cash to buy back its own shares, removing them from circulation. Each remaining share represents a slightly bigger slice of the company.
quick_def_locales.ja: 会社が自社の現金で自社株を買い戻し、市場から減らすこと。残った 1 株あたりの会社の取り分が少しずつ大きくなる。
quick_def_locales.es: Cuando una empresa usa su efectivo para recomprar sus propias acciones, retirándolas de circulación. Cada acción restante representa una porción ligeramente mayor de la empresa.
quick_def_locales.fil: Pag ginagamit ng kompanya ang sariling cash para bilhin pabalik ang sariling shares, inaalis sa circulation. Bawat natitirang share ay kaunting mas malaking parte ng kompanya.

why.en: Buyback authorizations signal management's confidence in cash flow. Mega-cap buybacks running alongside hyperscaler AI-capex commitments are the cohort signal that capex is underwritten by capital-return capacity.
why.ja: 自社株買いの枠は経営陣の現金創出力への自信を示す。メガキャップの自社株買いとハイパースケーラの AI capex コミットメントが並走する構図は、capex が資本還元能力で裏打ちされているというコホート信号。
why.es: Las autorizaciones de recompra señalan la confianza de la dirección en el flujo de caja. Las recompras de las mega-cap que acompañan a los compromisos de capex de IA de los hyperscalers son la señal de cohorte de que el capex está respaldado por la capacidad de retorno de capital.
why.fil: Pinapakita ng buyback authorizations ang confidence ng management sa cash flow. Ang mega-cap buybacks kasabay ng hyperscaler AI-capex commitments ay cohort signal na ang capex ay backed ng capital-return capacity.

terms.quick_def: Money a company spends on big things that last (data centers, GPUs) — counted differently than monthly bills.
terms.why_it_matters: Hyperscaler capex tells you how much compute is coming online and where the AI infrastructure bottleneck will be.
