quick_def_locales.en: Money a company spends on big things that last (data centers, GPUs) — counted differently than monthly bills.
quick_def_locales.ja: 会社が長く使う大きなもの (データセンターや GPU) に使うお金。月々の請求書とは会計上分けて扱う。
quick_def_locales.es: Dinero que una empresa gasta en cosas grandes que duran (centros de datos, GPUs) — se contabiliza diferente que las facturas mensuales.
quick_def_locales.fil: Pera na ginagastos ng kompanya sa malalaking bagay na pangmatagalan (data centers, GPUs) — iba ang accounting kaysa sa monthly bills.

why.en: Hyperscaler capex tells you how much compute is coming online and where the AI infrastructure bottleneck will be.
why.ja: ハイパースケーラの capex を見ると、これからどれだけの計算資源がオンラインになるか、AI インフラのボトルネックがどこに来るかが分かる。
why.es: El capex de los hyperscalers indica cuánto cómputo entrará en línea y dónde estará el cuello de botella de la infraestructura de IA.
why.fil: Sinasabi ng hyperscaler capex kung magkano ang darating na compute online at kung saan magkakaroon ng AI infrastructure bottleneck.

terms.quick_def: Turning words, sentences, or images into long lists of numbers so you can ask 'which of these are most similar?' — math instead of keyword matching. The fuel of vector search and RAG.
terms.why_it_matters: Embeddings are the bridge between LLMs and your data. Vector DBs as long-context cache layers (4/24 prediction) hinges on embeddings staying cheap and high-quality.

quick_def_locales.en: Turning words, sentences, or images into long lists of numbers so you can ask 'which of these are most similar?' — math instead of keyword matching. The fuel of vector search and RAG.
quick_def_locales.ja: 単語・文・画像を長い数値ベクトルに変換し、「どれが最も似ているか」を計算で問えるようにする手法 — キーワード一致ではなく数学。ベクトル検索と RAG の燃料。
quick_def_locales.es: Convertir palabras, frases o imágenes en largas listas de números para poder preguntar '¿cuáles son los más parecidos?' — matemáticas en vez de coincidencia por palabra clave. El combustible de la búsqueda vectorial y de RAG.
quick_def_locales.fil: Pagsasalin ng salita, pangungusap, o imahe sa mahabang listahan ng numero para makapagtanong ng 'alin ang pinakamagkakatulad?' — matematika sa halip na keyword matching. Ang gasolina ng vector search at RAG.

why.en: Embeddings are the bridge between LLMs and your data. Vector DBs as long-context cache layers (4/24 prediction) hinges on embeddings staying cheap and high-quality.
why.ja: エンベディングは LLM と自社データを繋ぐ橋渡し。「長文コンテクストキャッシュ層としてのベクトル DB」(4/24 予測) はエンベディングが安く高品質であり続けることに依存する。
why.es: Los embeddings son el puente entre los LLM y tus datos. La predicción del 4/24 (DBs vectoriales como capas de caché de contexto largo) depende de que los embeddings sigan siendo baratos y de alta calidad.
why.fil: Ang embeddings ang tulay sa pagitan ng LLMs at data mo. Nakasalalay sa pananatiling mura at high-quality ng embeddings ang prediction ng 4/24 (vector DBs bilang long-context cache layers).

terms.quick_def: Taking an already-trained AI model and giving it extra training on a smaller, focused dataset — so it picks up your task or style without re-training from scratch.
terms.why_it_matters: Fine-tuning + quantization + 1M-context defaults are the trio that drives the local-LLM-for-daily-use leg of User Prediction 2.

quick_def_locales.en: Taking an already-trained AI model and giving it extra training on a smaller, focused dataset — so it picks up your task or style without re-training from scratch.
quick_def_locales.ja: 学習済みの AI モデルに、より小さく的を絞ったデータで追加学習をさせる手法 — ゼロから再学習せずに、自分の課題やスタイルを覚えさせる。
quick_def_locales.es: Tomar un modelo de IA ya entrenado y darle entrenamiento extra con un conjunto de datos más pequeño y específico — para que aprenda tu tarea o estilo sin reentrenar desde cero.
quick_def_locales.fil: Pagkuha ng AI model na trained na at bigyan pa ng dagdag na training gamit ang mas maliit at focused na dataset — para matuto ito ng task o style mo nang hindi kailangang i-train muli mula sa simula.

why.en: Fine-tuning + quantization + 1M-context defaults are the trio that drives the local-LLM-for-daily-use leg of User Prediction 2.
why.ja: ファインチューニング + 量子化 + 1M コンテクストの三つ巴が、User Prediction 2 の「日常用途はローカル LLM」軸を駆動する。
why.es: Fine-tuning + cuantización + contexto por defecto de 1M son el trío que impulsa la pata de 'LLM local para uso diario' de la User Prediction 2.
why.fil: Ang fine-tuning + quantization + 1M-context defaults ang trio na nagtutulak sa local-LLM-for-daily-use leg ng User Prediction 2.

terms.quick_def: The handful of AI companies training the biggest, most capable models — currently Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, and a few challengers.
terms.why_it_matters: Frontier-lab pricing, model availability, and DoD posture set the terms every other lab and hyperscaler reacts to.

quick_def_locales.en: The handful of AI companies training the biggest, most capable models — currently Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, and a few challengers.
quick_def_locales.ja: 最大級で最も性能が高いモデルを訓練している少数の AI 企業 — 現在は Anthropic、OpenAI、Google DeepMind と少数の挑戦者。
quick_def_locales.es: El puñado de empresas de IA que entrenan los modelos más grandes y capaces — actualmente Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind y unos pocos retadores.
quick_def_locales.fil: Iilang AI companies na nag-train ng pinakamalalaki at pinakamatatalinong models — kasalukuyan ay Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, at ilang challengers.

why.en: Frontier-lab pricing, model availability, and DoD posture set the terms every other lab and hyperscaler reacts to.
why.ja: フロンティアラボの値付け・モデル供給・国防省への姿勢が、他のラボやハイパースケーラの行動を規定する。
why.es: Los precios, la disponibilidad de modelos y la postura ante el DoD de los frontier labs marcan las condiciones a las que reaccionan el resto de laboratorios e hyperscalers.
why.fil: Pinapatakbo ng frontier-lab pricing, model availability, at DoD posture ang mga terms na sinusunod ng ibang labs at hyperscalers.

terms.quick_def: One of the very big cloud companies (AWS, Azure, Google, Meta, Oracle) that runs millions of servers.
terms.why_it_matters: Their capex and AI alliances steer the entire market — frontier-lab pricing, chip availability, regional datacenter buildouts.

quick_def_locales.en: One of the very big cloud companies (AWS, Azure, Google, Meta, Oracle) that runs millions of servers.
quick_def_locales.ja: 何百万台ものサーバーを動かす超大手クラウド企業 (AWS、Azure、Google、Meta、Oracle) のひとつ。
quick_def_locales.es: Una de las muy grandes empresas de la nube (AWS, Azure, Google, Meta, Oracle) que opera millones de servidores.
quick_def_locales.fil: Isa sa mga pinakamalalaking cloud companies (AWS, Azure, Google, Meta, Oracle) na may milyun-milyong server.

why.en: Their capex and AI alliances steer the entire market — frontier-lab pricing, chip availability, regional datacenter buildouts.
why.ja: 彼らの capex と AI 提携が市場全体を動かす — フロンティアラボの値付け、チップの供給、地域データセンターの増設。
why.es: Su capex y sus alianzas con laboratorios de IA dirigen todo el mercado — precios de los frontier labs, disponibilidad de chips, despliegues regionales de centros de datos.
why.fil: Ang capex nila at AI alliances ang nagdidikta sa buong market — frontier-lab pricing, chip availability, regional datacenter buildouts.

terms.quick_def: Running a trained AI model to get answers — as opposed to training, which builds the model. Inference is what costs money every time someone uses your AI app.
terms.why_it_matters: Inference is where 80%+ of AI compute spend lives long-term. Inference-server CVEs, KV-cache compression, and quantization all live downstream of this distinction.

quick_def_locales.en: Running a trained AI model to get answers — as opposed to training, which builds the model. Inference is what costs money every time someone uses your AI app.
quick_def_locales.ja: 学習済み AI モデルを動かして回答を得る処理 — モデルを作る「訓練」と対をなす。AI アプリが使われるたびにコストが発生するのは推論側。
quick_def_locales.es: Ejecutar un modelo de IA ya entrenado para obtener respuestas — frente al entrenamiento, que construye el modelo. La inferencia es lo que cuesta dinero cada vez que alguien usa tu aplicación de IA.
quick_def_locales.fil: Pagpapatakbo ng trained AI model para makakuha ng sagot — kabaligtaran ng training, na nagbu-build ng model. Ang inference ang gumagastos tuwing may gumagamit ng AI app mo.

why.en: Inference is where 80%+ of AI compute spend lives long-term. Inference-server CVEs, KV-cache compression, and quantization all live downstream of this distinction.
why.ja: 推論こそ AI 計算費用の長期的な 80% 以上が集中する場所。推論サーバーの CVE、KV-cache 圧縮、量子化はすべてこの区別の下流。
why.es: La inferencia es donde a largo plazo vive más del 80% del gasto en cómputo de IA. Los CVE de servidores de inferencia, la compresión de KV-cache y la cuantización viven aguas abajo de esta distinción.
why.fil: Sa inference nakatira ang 80%+ ng long-term AI compute spend. Ang inference-server CVEs, KV-cache compression, at quantization ay lahat downstream ng distinction na ito.

terms.quick_def: A prompt that talks an LLM out of its safety rules — getting it to produce content the model is supposed to refuse. The LLM cousin of social engineering.
terms.why_it_matters: Jailbreak resistance + sandboxing + zero-trust together is what enterprises pay for. Frontier-lab gated enterprise channels exist precisely because raw API access provides insufficient containment for high-risk use cases.

quick_def_locales.en: A prompt that talks an LLM out of its safety rules — getting it to produce content the model is supposed to refuse. The LLM cousin of social engineering.
quick_def_locales.ja: LLM を安全規則から外れるよう説得するプロンプト — モデルが本来拒否すべき内容を出させる手口。LLM 版のソーシャルエンジニアリング。
quick_def_locales.es: Un prompt que convence a un LLM de saltarse sus reglas de seguridad — logrando que produzca contenido que el modelo debería rechazar. El primo LLM de la ingeniería social.
quick_def_locales.fil: Prompt na hinihikayat ang LLM na lampasan ang safety rules nito — para magproduce ng content na dapat sana'y i-refuse. LLM cousin ng social engineering.

why.en: Jailbreak resistance + sandboxing + zero-trust together is what enterprises pay for. Frontier-lab gated enterprise channels exist precisely because raw API access provides insufficient containment for high-risk use cases.
why.ja: 脱獄耐性 + サンドボックス + Zero Trust の三点こそが企業が対価を払う対象。フロンティアラボのゲート付きエンタープライズチャネルは、生 API アクセスでは高リスク用途への封じ込めが不十分だから存在する。
why.es: La resistencia al jailbreak + sandboxing + zero-trust juntos es lo que pagan las empresas. Los canales empresariales con barrera de los laboratorios de IA frontera existen precisamente porque el acceso API en bruto no contiene lo suficiente para casos de uso de alto riesgo.
why.fil: Ang jailbreak resistance + sandboxing + zero-trust ang sama-samang binabayaran ng enterprises. Ang gated enterprise channels ng frontier labs ay umiiral dahil hindi sapat ang containment ng raw API access para sa high-risk use cases.

terms.quick_def: An LLM that runs on your own hardware — laptop, phone, on-prem server — instead of being called via someone else's cloud API. Privacy, cost, and offline capability are the typical drivers.
terms.why_it_matters: Local LLM is the 'daily use' leg of User Prediction 2 — and the topic-coverage spine of news-topics.md (Platform / Embedded / Models / Optimization all key off it). On-device throughput on flagship phones is the canonical viability marker.

quick_def_locales.en: An LLM that runs on your own hardware — laptop, phone, on-prem server — instead of being called via someone else's cloud API. Privacy, cost, and offline capability are the typical drivers.
quick_def_locales.ja: 自分のハードウェア (ノート PC、スマホ、社内サーバ) で動く LLM — 他社クラウド API を経由しない使い方。プライバシー、コスト、オフライン対応が主な動機。
quick_def_locales.es: Un LLM que se ejecuta en tu propio hardware — portátil, móvil, servidor on-prem — en vez de llamarse vía la API cloud de otra persona. Privacidad, coste y capacidad offline son los motores típicos.
quick_def_locales.fil: LLM na tumatakbo sa sarili mong hardware — laptop, phone, on-prem server — sa halip na tawagin via cloud API ng iba. Privacy, cost, at offline capability ang typical drivers.

why.en: Local LLM is the 'daily use' leg of User Prediction 2 — and the topic-coverage spine of news-topics.md (Platform / Embedded / Models / Optimization all key off it). On-device throughput on flagship phones is the canonical viability marker.
why.ja: ローカル LLM は User Prediction 2 の「日常用途」軸であり、news-topics.md のトピック構成の背骨 (プラットフォーム / 組み込み / モデル / 最適化はすべてこの軸でぶら下がる)。フラグシップスマートフォン上のオンデバイス・スループットが実用性マーカー。
why.es: El LLM local es la pata de 'uso diario' de la User Prediction 2 — y la columna vertebral temática de news-topics.md (Plataforma / Embebido / Modelos / Optimización dependen de él). El rendimiento on-device en teléfonos insignia es el marcador canónico de viabilidad.
why.fil: Ang local LLM ang 'daily use' leg ng User Prediction 2 — at backbone ng topic coverage sa news-topics.md (Platform / Embedded / Models / Optimization ay lahat naka-key dito). Ang on-device throughput sa flagship phones ang canonical viability marker.

terms.quick_def: An AI model whose trained parameters can be downloaded and run yourself — versus closed models you only access via someone else's API. Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM are open-weight.
terms.why_it_matters: Open-weight model quality has caught up enough that User Prediction 2's 'local LLMs for daily use' leg has cohort-scale supply: DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Kimi K2.6, GLM-5.1.

quick_def_locales.en: An AI model whose trained parameters can be downloaded and run yourself — versus closed models you only access via someone else's API. Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM are open-weight.
quick_def_locales.ja: 学習済みパラメータをダウンロードして自分で動かせる AI モデル — 他社 API 経由でしか触れない非公開モデルの対義語。Llama、DeepSeek、Qwen、GLM がオープンウェイト。
quick_def_locales.es: Un modelo de IA cuyos parámetros entrenados se pueden descargar y ejecutar uno mismo — frente a modelos cerrados a los que solo se accede vía la API de otra persona. Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen y GLM son open-weight.
quick_def_locales.fil: AI model kung saan pwede mong i-download at patakbuhin mismo ang trained parameters — kabaligtaran ng closed models na via API lang ng iba. Open-weight ang Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen, at GLM.

why.en: Open-weight model quality has caught up enough that User Prediction 2's 'local LLMs for daily use' leg has cohort-scale supply: DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Kimi K2.6, GLM-5.1.
why.ja: オープンウェイトモデルの品質が追いついた結果、User Prediction 2 の「日常用途はローカル LLM」軸はコホート規模の供給を得た: DeepSeek V4、Qwen 3.6、Kimi K2.6、GLM-5.1。
why.es: La calidad de los modelos open-weight ha alcanzado lo suficiente para que la pata 'LLM local para uso diario' de la User Prediction 2 tenga oferta a escala de cohorte: DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Kimi K2.6, GLM-5.1.
why.fil: Sapat na nahabol ng open-weight model quality kaya may cohort-scale supply na ang 'local LLMs for daily use' leg ng User Prediction 2: DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Kimi K2.6, GLM-5.1.

terms.quick_def: The text you give an LLM to set the task — instructions, examples, the actual question. The 'system prompt' is the hidden instructions a product layers on top of yours.
terms.why_it_matters: Prompts are the new programming surface — and the new attack surface. Both User Prediction 1's threat model and the Mythos red-team success story live here.

quick_def_locales.en: The text you give an LLM to set the task — instructions, examples, the actual question. The 'system prompt' is the hidden instructions a product layers on top of yours.
quick_def_locales.ja: LLM に課題を伝えるために与えるテキスト — 指示、例、実際の質問。「システムプロンプト」は、製品があなたの入力の上に重ねる隠れた指示文。
quick_def_locales.es: El texto que le das a un LLM para fijar la tarea — instrucciones, ejemplos, la pregunta real. El 'system prompt' son las instrucciones ocultas que un producto pone sobre las tuyas.
quick_def_locales.fil: Ang text na binibigay mo sa LLM para i-set ang task — instructions, examples, mismong tanong. Ang 'system prompt' ay yung nakatagong instructions na nilalapatan ng product sa ibabaw ng sa'yo.

why.en: Prompts are the new programming surface — and the new attack surface. Both User Prediction 1's threat model and the Mythos red-team success story live here.
why.ja: プロンプトは新たなプログラミング面 — そして新たな攻撃面。User Prediction 1 の脅威モデルも Mythos のレッドチーム成功例も、ここで起きている。
why.es: Los prompts son la nueva superficie de programación — y la nueva superficie de ataque. Tanto el modelo de amenaza de la User Prediction 1 como el éxito de red-team de Mythos viven aquí.
why.fil: Ang prompts ang bagong programming surface — at bagong attack surface. Dito nakatira ang threat model ng User Prediction 1 at ang Mythos red-team success story.

terms.quick_def: When an LLM stores the work it did on a long shared instructions block, so the next call reuses it instead of re-computing — way cheaper and faster.
terms.why_it_matters: Prompt caching turns 'long context' from a cost problem into a cost advantage. Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI all expose it; per-token-margin disclosures will hinge on it.

quick_def_locales.en: When an LLM stores the work it did on a long shared instructions block, so the next call reuses it instead of re-computing — way cheaper and faster.
quick_def_locales.ja: LLM が長い共有指示ブロックの計算結果を保存し、次の呼び出しで再計算せず再利用する仕組み — 大幅に安く・速くなる。
quick_def_locales.es: Cuando un LLM guarda el trabajo hecho sobre un bloque largo de instrucciones compartidas, para que la siguiente llamada lo reutilice en lugar de recalcularlo — mucho más barato y rápido.
quick_def_locales.fil: Pag ini-store ng LLM ang ginawang computation sa mahabang shared instructions block, para gamitin muli ng susunod na call sa halip na i-compute ulit — mas mura at mabilis.

why.en: Prompt caching turns 'long context' from a cost problem into a cost advantage. Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI all expose it; per-token-margin disclosures will hinge on it.
why.ja: プロンプトキャッシュは「長文コンテクスト」をコスト負担からコスト優位に変える。Anthropic、Google、OpenAI のいずれも提供しており、トークン単価マージンの開示はこれに左右される。
why.es: El prompt caching convierte el 'contexto largo' de problema de coste en ventaja de coste. Anthropic, Google y OpenAI lo exponen; la divulgación de margen por token dependerá de esto.
why.fil: Pinapaging cost-advantage ng prompt caching ang dating cost-problem na 'long context'. Inalok ito ng Anthropic, Google, at OpenAI; ang per-token-margin disclosures ay nakasalalay dito.

terms.quick_def: An attack where text from a webpage, email, or document tricks an AI into ignoring its real instructions and following the attacker's instead. The XSS of the LLM era.
terms.why_it_matters: Prompt injection is named in ATT&CK v19 as 'context poisoning' — the technique that elevated the agentic-AI threat class into a CNA-issued sub-corpus.

quick_def_locales.en: An attack where text from a webpage, email, or document tricks an AI into ignoring its real instructions and following the attacker's instead. The XSS of the LLM era.
quick_def_locales.ja: Web ページ・メール・文書中のテキストが AI を騙して、本来の指示を無視し攻撃者の指示に従わせる攻撃。LLM 時代の XSS。
quick_def_locales.es: Un ataque en el que el texto de una página web, correo o documento engaña a una IA para que ignore sus instrucciones reales y siga las del atacante. El XSS de la era LLM.
quick_def_locales.fil: Atake kung saan dinadaya ng text mula sa webpage, email, o document ang AI para hindi sundin ang totoong instructions nito at sundin yung sa attacker. Ang XSS ng LLM era.

why.en: Prompt injection is named in ATT&CK v19 as 'context poisoning' — the technique that elevated the agentic-AI threat class into a CNA-issued sub-corpus.
why.ja: プロンプトインジェクションは ATT&CK v19 で「context poisoning」として命名され、エージェント AI の脅威クラスを CNA 発行のサブコーパスに引き上げた手法。
why.es: La inyección de prompts está nombrada en ATT&CK v19 como 'context poisoning' — la técnica que elevó la clase de amenaza de IA agéntica a un subcorpus emitido por una CNA.
why.fil: Ang prompt injection ay pinangalanan sa ATT&CK v19 na 'context poisoning' — ang technique na nagpaakyat sa agentic-AI threat class para maging CNA-issued sub-corpus.

terms.quick_def: Shrinking an AI model by storing each number with fewer bits — like saving a photo as JPEG instead of raw RAW. Loses a tiny bit of accuracy, gains a lot of speed and memory.
terms.why_it_matters: Quantization (TurboQuant, GPTQ, AWQ, FP8, 1-bit) is what makes local LLMs viable on consumer hardware. Where the inference-cost curve actually moves.

quick_def_locales.en: Shrinking an AI model by storing each number with fewer bits — like saving a photo as JPEG instead of raw RAW. Loses a tiny bit of accuracy, gains a lot of speed and memory.
quick_def_locales.ja: AI モデルの各数値をより少ないビット数で保持してサイズを縮める手法 — 写真を RAW でなく JPEG で保存するイメージ。少しの精度損失と引き換えに大きな速度・メモリ改善が得られる。
quick_def_locales.es: Encoger un modelo de IA almacenando cada número con menos bits — como guardar una foto en JPEG en vez de RAW. Pierdes un poco de precisión, ganas mucha velocidad y memoria.
quick_def_locales.fil: Pagliit sa AI model sa pamamagitan ng pag-store sa bawat numero gamit ang mas kaunting bits — parang pag-save ng photo bilang JPEG sa halip na RAW. Konting accuracy ang nawawala, malaking speed at memory ang napapala.

why.en: Quantization (TurboQuant, GPTQ, AWQ, FP8, 1-bit) is what makes local LLMs viable on consumer hardware. Where the inference-cost curve actually moves.
why.ja: 量子化 (TurboQuant、GPTQ、AWQ、FP8、1-bit) こそがローカル LLM をコンシューマ向けハードで成立させる鍵。推論コスト曲線が実際に動く場所。
why.es: La cuantización (TurboQuant, GPTQ, AWQ, FP8, 1-bit) es lo que hace viables los LLMs locales en hardware de consumo. Donde la curva de coste de inferencia se mueve realmente.
why.fil: Ang quantization (TurboQuant, GPTQ, AWQ, FP8, 1-bit) ang nagpapaposible sa local LLMs sa consumer hardware. Dito talaga gumagalaw ang inference-cost curve.

terms.quick_def: A security team whose job is to attack their own systems before real attackers do. AI red teams use LLMs to find bugs, jailbreaks, and unsafe outputs at scale.
terms.why_it_matters: Autonomous red-teaming is the operative case-study for User Prediction 1 (zero-trust era) and User Prediction 3 (RL-trained agents) — frontier-lab autonomous red-team tooling is the visible class of example.

quick_def_locales.en: A security team whose job is to attack their own systems before real attackers do. AI red teams use LLMs to find bugs, jailbreaks, and unsafe outputs at scale.
quick_def_locales.ja: 実際の攻撃者より先に自社システムを攻撃するのが仕事のセキュリティチーム。AI レッドチームは LLM を使ってバグ・脱獄・安全でない出力を大規模に発見する。
quick_def_locales.es: Un equipo de seguridad cuya misión es atacar sus propios sistemas antes que los atacantes reales. Los red teams de IA usan LLMs para encontrar bugs, jailbreaks y salidas inseguras a escala.
quick_def_locales.fil: Security team na ang trabaho ay atakihin ang sariling system nila bago gawin ng totoong attackers. Ang AI red teams ay gumagamit ng LLMs para makahanap ng bugs, jailbreaks, at unsafe outputs sa scale.

why.en: Autonomous red-teaming is the operative case-study for User Prediction 1 (zero-trust era) and User Prediction 3 (RL-trained agents) — frontier-lab autonomous red-team tooling is the visible class of example.
why.ja: 自律レッドチームは User Prediction 1 (Zero Trust 時代) と User Prediction 3 (RL 訓練エージェント) 双方の運用ケーススタディ — フロンティアラボの自律レッドチームツール群がその可視例。
why.es: El red-teaming autónomo es el caso operativo de la User Prediction 1 (era zero-trust) y de la User Prediction 3 (agentes entrenados por RL) — las herramientas de red-team autónomo de los laboratorios de IA frontera son la clase de ejemplos visibles.
why.fil: Ang autonomous red-teaming ang operative case-study para sa User Prediction 1 (zero-trust era) at User Prediction 3 (RL-trained agents) — ang autonomous red-team tooling ng frontier labs ang visible class of example.

terms.quick_def: The smallest unit an LLM reads and writes — usually 3-4 characters or part of a word. 'unbelievable' might be 3 tokens. Pricing and context limits are counted in tokens.
terms.why_it_matters: Per-token pricing is the unit that frontier labs and hyperscalers compete on. The capex-vs-margin debate translates to per-token economics.

quick_def_locales.en: The smallest unit an LLM reads and writes — usually 3-4 characters or part of a word. 'unbelievable' might be 3 tokens. Pricing and context limits are counted in tokens.
quick_def_locales.ja: LLM が読み書きする最小単位 — 通常 3-4 文字または単語の一部。「unbelievable」が 3 トークンになるイメージ。料金とコンテキスト上限はトークン単位で数える。
quick_def_locales.es: La unidad más pequeña que un LLM lee y escribe — generalmente de 3 a 4 caracteres o parte de una palabra. 'unbelievable' podría ser 3 tokens. El precio y los límites de contexto se cuentan en tokens.
quick_def_locales.fil: Pinakamaliit na unit na binabasa at sinusulat ng LLM — kadalasan 3-4 characters o bahagi ng salita. Maaaring 3 tokens ang 'unbelievable'. Sa tokens binibilang ang pricing at context limits.

why.en: Per-token pricing is the unit that frontier labs and hyperscalers compete on. The capex-vs-margin debate translates to per-token economics.
why.ja: トークン単価こそがフロンティアラボとハイパースケーラの競争軸。capex vs マージン議論はトークン単価の経済に翻訳される。
why.es: El precio por token es la unidad sobre la que compiten frontier labs e hyperscalers. El debate capex-vs-margen se traduce en economía por token.
why.fil: Per-token pricing ang unit na pinaglalabanan ng frontier labs at hyperscalers. Ang capex-vs-margin debate ay nagiging per-token economics.

terms.quick_def: When an LLM, instead of answering with text, calls a function — search the web, run code, query a database — and feeds the result back into its reasoning.
terms.why_it_matters: Tool use is the primitive that turns an LLM into an agent. Tool-call audit logs are the operative observability surface that Microsoft Agent 365 ships.

quick_def_locales.en: When an LLM, instead of answering with text, calls a function — search the web, run code, query a database — and feeds the result back into its reasoning.
quick_def_locales.ja: LLM が回答をテキストで返す代わりに、関数を呼び出し — Web 検索、コード実行、DB クエリ — その結果を自分の推論に取り込む仕組み。
quick_def_locales.es: Cuando un LLM, en vez de responder con texto, llama a una función — buscar en la web, ejecutar código, consultar una base de datos — y vuelve a meter el resultado en su razonamiento.
quick_def_locales.fil: Pag tumatawag ng function ang LLM (search sa web, mag-run ng code, mag-query ng database) sa halip na sumagot ng text, at ibabalik ang resulta sa sariling reasoning niya.

why.en: Tool use is the primitive that turns an LLM into an agent. Tool-call audit logs are the operative observability surface that Microsoft Agent 365 ships.
why.ja: ツール使用は LLM をエージェントに変えるプリミティブ。ツール呼び出しの監査ログこそが、Microsoft Agent 365 が出荷する可観測性の場。
why.es: El uso de herramientas es la primitiva que convierte un LLM en un agente. Los logs de auditoría de tool-calls son la superficie de observabilidad operativa que entrega Microsoft Agent 365.
why.fil: Ang tool use ang primitive na nagpapagiging agent sa LLM. Ang tool-call audit logs ang operative observability surface na ipinapadala ng Microsoft Agent 365.

terms.quick_def: The neural-network design behind every modern LLM — invented by Google in 2017 and now powering GPT, Claude, Gemini, and friends. The 'T' in 'GPT'.
terms.why_it_matters: Every assumption in the AI capex thesis — KV-cache compression, attention scaling, quantization — is downstream of how transformers compute. New architectures (Mamba, RWKV) remain niche.

quick_def_locales.en: The neural-network design behind every modern LLM — invented by Google in 2017 and now powering GPT, Claude, Gemini, and friends. The 'T' in 'GPT'.
quick_def_locales.ja: 現代の LLM すべての土台となるニューラルネット設計 — 2017 年に Google が発表し、GPT、Claude、Gemini などを動かしている。「GPT」の「T」。
quick_def_locales.es: El diseño de red neuronal detrás de todo LLM moderno — inventado por Google en 2017 y hoy impulsa GPT, Claude, Gemini y compañía. La 'T' de 'GPT'.
quick_def_locales.fil: Ang neural-network design sa likod ng bawat modernong LLM — inimbento ng Google noong 2017 at ngayon ay nagpapagana sa GPT, Claude, Gemini, atbp. Ang 'T' sa 'GPT'.

why.en: Every assumption in the AI capex thesis — KV-cache compression, attention scaling, quantization — is downstream of how transformers compute. New architectures (Mamba, RWKV) remain niche.
why.ja: AI capex テーゼのすべての前提 — KV-cache 圧縮、アテンション・スケーリング、量子化 — はトランスフォーマーがどう計算するかの下流。新アーキテクチャ (Mamba、RWKV) はニッチに留まる。
why.es: Cada supuesto de la tesis del capex de IA — compresión de KV-cache, escalado de atención, cuantización — vive aguas abajo de cómo computa el transformer. Las nuevas arquitecturas (Mamba, RWKV) siguen siendo nicho.
why.fil: Lahat ng assumption sa AI capex thesis — KV-cache compression, attention scaling, quantization — ay downstream ng kung paano nagkalkula ang transformers. Niche pa rin ang bagong architectures (Mamba, RWKV).

terms.quick_def: An open-source server that runs large language models efficiently — does the heavy lifting between an app and the GPU. Widely used by enterprises self-hosting LLMs.
terms.why_it_matters: Inference-server-as-primitive-supply-chain thesis: vLLM CVEs propagate to every enterprise running it. The control plane for cost and latency on private deployments.

quick_def_locales.en: An open-source server that runs large language models efficiently — does the heavy lifting between an app and the GPU. Widely used by enterprises self-hosting LLMs.
quick_def_locales.ja: 大規模言語モデルを効率よく実行するオープンソースサーバー。アプリと GPU の間の重い処理を引き受ける。LLM を自社運用する企業に広く使われている。
quick_def_locales.es: Un servidor de código abierto que ejecuta modelos de lenguaje grandes de forma eficiente — hace el trabajo pesado entre una aplicación y la GPU. Muy usado por empresas que se autoalojan los LLMs.
quick_def_locales.fil: Open-source server na efficient na nagpapatakbo ng large language models — siya ang gumagawa ng heavy work sa pagitan ng app at GPU. Ginagamit ng maraming enterprises na self-hosting ng LLMs.

why.en: Inference-server-as-primitive-supply-chain thesis: vLLM CVEs propagate to every enterprise running it. The control plane for cost and latency on private deployments.
why.ja: 「推論サーバーがプリミティブなサプライチェーン」というテーゼの中心。vLLM の CVE は使っている全企業に波及する。プライベート配備でのコストとレイテンシの操縦盤。
why.es: Tesis del servidor de inferencia como cadena de suministro primitiva: los CVE de vLLM se propagan a cada empresa que lo ejecuta. El plano de control de coste y latencia en despliegues privados.
why.fil: Inference-server-as-primitive-supply-chain thesis: pagdating ng vLLM CVE, kumakalat ito sa lahat ng enterprise na gumagamit. Ito ang control plane para sa cost at latency sa private deployments.

terms.quick_def: A bug attackers know about and exploit before the vendor has had a chance to fix it — patch is on day zero of public knowledge. The most expensive bug class on the underground market.
terms.why_it_matters: Autonomous red-teaming at scale — frontier-lab tooling discovering thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities in single runs — reframes the zero-day economy itself: supply produced at industrial rather than artisanal scale.

quick_def_locales.en: A bug attackers know about and exploit before the vendor has had a chance to fix it — patch is on day zero of public knowledge. The most expensive bug class on the underground market.
quick_def_locales.ja: ベンダーが修正できる前から攻撃者が知り悪用しているバグ — 公開初日 (day 0) には既にパッチが無い状態。地下市場で最も高値のバグ種類。
quick_def_locales.es: Un bug que los atacantes conocen y explotan antes de que el proveedor haya tenido oportunidad de parchearlo — el parche está en el día cero del conocimiento público. La clase de bug más cara en el mercado clandestino.
quick_def_locales.fil: Bug na alam at ginagamit na ng attackers bago pa nagagawa ng vendor ang patch — wala pang patch sa unang araw (day zero) na nalalaman ito. Pinakamahal na klase ng bug sa underground market.

why.en: Autonomous red-teaming at scale — frontier-lab tooling discovering thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities in single runs — reframes the zero-day economy itself: supply produced at industrial rather than artisanal scale.
why.ja: 大規模な自律レッドチーム — フロンティアラボのツールが単一の実行で数千件のゼロデイを発見しうる事実 — がゼロデイ経済そのものを再定義する。供給が職人的ではなく産業規模で生産される構造へ。
why.es: El red-teaming autónomo a escala — herramientas de laboratorios de IA frontera que descubren miles de vulnerabilidades zero-day en ejecuciones individuales — reformula la propia economía del zero-day: oferta producida a escala industrial en lugar de artesanal.
why.fil: Ang autonomous red-teaming sa scale — frontier-lab tooling na nakakatuklas ng libo-libong zero-day vulnerabilities sa iisang run — ay nagbabago sa mismong zero-day economy: ang supply ay nagiging industrial scale, hindi na artisanal.
